# 产物目录

本文从“看到一个文件后怎么理解它”的角度列出关键 artifact。`docs/system_flow.md` 仍是工程事实源；本文是阅读索引，帮助使用者判断 artifact 的生成者、上游输入、下游用途、production 影响和常见误解。

如果需要理解输入数据如何计算成输出数据，先读 `docs/calculation_logic.md`；字段级含义见 `docs/schema/fields.yaml`，也可以用 `aits explain <field|gate|artifact>` 做只读反查。该 YAML 先覆盖 `scores_daily.csv`、decision snapshot、trace bundle、prediction ledger 和 shadow parameter search 的核心字段。

## TRADING-1506～1526 Expanded QQQ / SGOV / TQQQ Allocation Search

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/expanded_qqq_sgov_tqqq_universe_scope.md`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe scope-review`|`config/research/expanded_allocation_universe.yaml`、market regime policy、TQQQ research-only policy|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_UNIVERSE_SCOPE_READY`；必须披露 `market_regime=ai_after_chatgpt`、default backtest start、asset universe、TQQQ role、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`、`production_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`、dynamic promotion `BLOCKED`|定义 expanded QQQ / SGOV / TQQQ universe 的研究范围和禁止晋升边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|scope ready 不是加入 promotion universe，也不是允许 TQQQ paper-shadow、production 或 broker。|
|`docs/research/tqqq_data_quality_blocking_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/tqqq_data_quality_blocking_review.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe tqqq-data-quality-review`|Validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ prices and rates through the same cached-data quality gate as `aits validate-data`、TQQQ adjustment warning evidence、expanded universe config|Schema contract：status=`TQQQ_RESEARCH_ONLY_APPROVED`；输出 data quality status、TQQQ issue count、adjusted-close source、research universe status、promotion universe blocker 和 fixed safety fields|把 TQQQ 2025 adjustment warning 从非阻断 watchlist 升级为 formal review，并明确只允许 research-only 使用|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`TQQQ_RESEARCH_ONLY_APPROVED` 只批准研究宇宙，不解除 TQQQ promotion blocker，也不允许用 `3 * QQQ daily return` 合成 TQQQ。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_index.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_metrics.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_pareto_frontier.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/static_simplex_grid/static_simplex_grid_risk_bucket_summary.csv`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe static-simplex-grid --step 0.05`|Expanded universe config、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ adjusted-close price cache、validated rates cache、monthly rebalance policy、risk bucket policy|Schema contract：status=`STATIC_SIMPLEX_GRID_READY`；rows include weights、QQQ-equivalent exposure、return / drawdown / Sharpe / Calmar / volatility / turnover / cost / TQQQ contribution fields、risk bucket、data quality status and fixed no-promotion safety fields|生成三资产静态 simplex frontier、risk bucket summary 和后续代表组合输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|frontier high rank 不是交易建议；static grid 用 monthly static rebalance，不等同 dynamic actual-path 执行。|
|`docs/research/expanded_universe_static_frontier_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_static_frontier_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe static-frontier-review`|Static simplex grid metrics/frontier、expanded universe config、data quality status、risk bucket policy|Schema contract：status=`STATIC_FRONTIER_REVIEW_READY`；记录 grid size、frontier row count、best static candidate、config hash、market regime、date range and fixed safety fields|把 ignored runtime grid 总结为 tracked frontier review/matrix，供 owner 理解同风险静态基准|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|best static candidate 只是当前 risk policy 下的研究结论，不是 production target weight。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/risk_bucket_representatives.csv`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe risk-bucket-representatives`|Static simplex grid metrics、risk bucket selector policy、QQQ-equivalent exposure buckets|Schema contract：status=`RISK_BUCKET_REPRESENTATIVES_READY`；每个 bucket 输出 highest-return、highest-Sharpe、lowest-drawdown 等代表组合及 metric provenance|从静态 frontier 中抽取可解释代表组合，作为 state-to-portfolio candidate 的候选池|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|representative 不是仓位指令，也不是 dynamic strategy 通过 survival gate。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/state_portfolio_candidates.json`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe state-portfolio-candidates`|Risk bucket representatives、state mapping policy、trend-state policy、monotonic risk classifier policy|Schema contract：status=`STATE_PORTFOLIO_CANDIDATES_READY`；记录 state weights、source representative、monotonic exposure ordering、violations、config hash and fixed safety fields|构造不局限于 65/35 和 45/55 的 expanded state-to-portfolio candidates|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|monotonic pass 只是形状约束通过，不代表 actual-path edge、overfit guardrail 或 owner approval。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/leaderboard_actual_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/leaderboard_target_path_diagnostic.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/target_vs_actual_gap_summary.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/tqqq_risk_summary.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/expanded_universe_promotion_readiness.json`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe actual-path-rebacktest`|State candidates、static frontier candidates、limited-adjustment baseline policy、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ/rates cache、actual-path execution lag and transaction-cost policy|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_UNIVERSE_RESEARCH_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；leaderboard ranking uses actual-path metrics only；target path is diagnostic-only；outputs include TQQQ risk summary、same data quality status、promotion readiness blockers and fixed safety fields|对 expanded static/dynamic candidates 运行 actual-path-only rebacktest，并保留 target-vs-actual gap diagnostic|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|actual-path leaderboard 第一名也不是 promotion；target-path diagnostic 不允许用于 ranking、readiness 或 owner decision 正向依据。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/expanded_universe/actual_path_rebacktest/candidate_failure_matrix.csv`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_actual_path_candidate_failure_matrix.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_actual_path_candidate_failure_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe candidate-failure-matrix`|Actual-path leaderboard、static simplex metrics、state portfolio candidates、TQQQ risk summary、same-risk/survival/walk-forward/net-cost/stress policies in `config/research/expanded_allocation_universe.yaml`|Schema contract：status=`CANDIDATE_FAILURE_MATRIX_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；每行输出 candidate_id、weights_by_state、tqqq_weight_profile、qqq_equivalent_exposure、actual_return、max_dd、Sharpe、Calmar、same_risk_baseline、delta_vs_same_risk_baseline、verdict、dominating static frontier baseline、TQQQ beta-only、same-risk underperformance、walk-forward/stress/net-cost blockers、failure_reason、next_action 和 fixed safety fields|把 11 个 actual-path candidates 的失败原因拆成候选级矩阵，供 owner 复核为什么没有 surviving candidate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|failure matrix 是解释性 artifact，不是重新排名或晋升；`next_action` 只描述 research follow-up，不批准 paper-shadow、production、broker 或真实交易。|
|`docs/research/expanded_qqq_sgov_tqqq_allocation_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/tqqq_risk_attribution_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_dynamic_candidate_survival_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_walk_forward_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_net_of_cost_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_stress_risk_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/tqqq_risk_attribution_matrix.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_same_risk_baseline_comparison.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_dynamic_candidate_survival_matrix.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_walk_forward_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies expanded-universe owner-review-pack`|Actual-path rebacktest outputs、TQQQ data-quality review、static frontier review, same-risk baseline policy、survival policy、walk-forward/net-cost/stress policies|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_OWNER_REVIEW_PACK_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；must answer owner questions, include TQQQ attribution, same-risk comparison, survival matrix, overfit/walk-forward/cost/stress blockers and fixed no paper-shadow/no production/no broker fields|给 owner 汇总 expanded universe 研究证据、survival conclusion 和后续 blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|owner pack 是人工复核输入，不是 owner approval；surviving candidate count 为 0 时不得把 best dynamic candidate 解释为可推广策略。|

## TRADING-1527～1546 Defensive Overlay Gate and No-Survivor Diagnosis

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/defensive_overlay_gate.yaml`|人工治理配置；由 `aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack` 读取|Owner 附件、expanded candidate failure matrix、heuristic governance policy|Schema contract：`schema_version=defensive_overlay_gate.v1`；必须包含 owner/status/rationale/intended_effect/validation_evidence/review_condition；所有阈值只为 `pilot_baseline` defensive overlay watch-only gate|把 full allocation gate 与 defensive overlay gate 分开，治理 drawdown/cost/stress/walk-forward/TQQQ pilot 阈值|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|配置存在不等于正式策略门槛；它不允许 promotion、paper-shadow、production 或 broker。|
|`docs/research/expanded_universe_no_survivor_diagnosis.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_no_survivor_diagnosis.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|`candidate_failure_matrix.csv`、defensive overlay gate config、同源 cached data quality gate|Schema contract：status=`EXPANDED_UNIVERSE_NO_SURVIVOR_DIAGNOSIS_READY`；披露 candidate count、full allocation survivor count、static frontier dominance、walk-forward、stress、net-cost blockers 和 fixed safety fields|解释 expanded universe 为什么 no survivor，并作为 overlay reclassification 输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|No-survivor diagnosis 不是重新开放 full allocation；它只说明下一层 overlay 诊断的输入边界。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/defensive_overlay/overlay_metrics.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_candidate_reclassification_matrix.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|Failure matrix、candidate actual daily positions、same-risk static baseline weights、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ price cache|Schema contract：reclassification status=`EXPANDED_CANDIDATE_RECLASSIFICATION_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；metrics row status is expressed by `overlay_classification` / `overlay_gate_passed` and fixed safety fields；每行包含 candidate_id、full_allocation_verdict、same_risk_baseline、actual-path defensive metrics、risk-off attribution、re-risk delay、downside capture、TQQQ exposure、allowed_use 和 blockers|把 full-allocation failure rows 重分类为 primary watch、drawdown-control diagnostic、TQQQ diagnostic、static reference 或 archive|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`watch_pending` 不是 gate pass；CSV 是 runtime research evidence，不是 broker universe 或 target weights。|
|`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_candidate_set.yaml`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_survival_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_survival_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_stress_gate.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|Overlay metrics、policy thresholds、walk-forward/stress fields from failure matrix|Schema contract：status 包含 `PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；当前 primary watch=`limited_adjustment`，drawdown-control diagnostics 为 expanded state drawdown candidates，high-risk TQQQ candidate 为 research-only diagnostic；overlay_gate_pass_count 当前为 0|定义 defensive overlay candidate set 与 survival/stress gate 结果|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Primary watch 只是 split-evidence pending 的 research-only watch，不是 paper-shadow readiness。|
|`docs/research/defensive_overlay_risk_off_attribution_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/defensive_overlay_risk_off_attribution.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_re_risk_timing_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_downside_stress_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/static_frontier_domination_overlay_interpretation.md`<br/>`docs/research/tqqq_overlay_safety_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_net_of_cost_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/expanded_universe_walk_forward_split_evidence_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/expanded_universe_walk_forward_split_evidence.yaml`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|Overlay metrics、candidate set、failure matrix blocker fields|Schema contract：所有 review 输出 `research_only=true`、`promotion_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_allowed=false`、`production_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`；target-path metrics 不允许过 gate|分面解释 risk-off attribution、re-risk delay、downside/stress、static frontier domination、TQQQ safety、net-of-cost 和 split-evidence blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|分面 review 不能单独覆盖 survival gate；TQQQ safety review 不是 TQQQ 使用批准。|
|`docs/research/defensive_overlay_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/defensive_overlay_forward_watch_plan.md`|`aits research strategies defensive-overlay full-pack`|No-survivor diagnosis、candidate set、survival matrix、risk-off/stress/net-cost/walk-forward reviews|Schema contract：status=`DEFENSIVE_OVERLAY_OWNER_REVIEW_PACK_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；owner recommendation 固定为 research-only watch pending split evidence；forward watch plan 只列 required evidence|给 owner 一页式复核 defensive overlay 是否继续观察、需要哪些后续证据|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Owner pack 不是 owner approval；forward watch plan 不是 scheduler activation 或 observation write。|

## TRADING-1547～1586 Policy-Aware First-Layer Trend Calibration

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/first_layer_calibration_scope.yaml`<br/>`config/research/dynamic_second_layer_probe_registry.yaml`<br/>`config/research/action_value_score_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_trend_scorecard_v1.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_scope.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Defensive overlay no-survivor 结论、owner 附件、heuristic governance policy、AI-after-ChatGPT regime policy|Schema contract：配置必须包含 owner/status/rationale/intended_effect/validation_evidence/review_condition；second-layer probes 必须 frozen、dynamic、trend-sensitive；static baseline 不得生成 trend labels；第一层输出只能是 trend state / confidence / validity / decay|定义第一层 trend calibration 的 research scope、probe set、label policy 和 scorecard policy|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|scope/config ready 不是恢复 dynamic promotion，也不是允许第一层直接输出 portfolio weights。|
|`outputs/research_trends/action_value_matrix/action_value_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/action_value_matrix/action_value_summary.json`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Frozen dynamic probes、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ adjusted-close price cache、rates cache、action-value score policy|Schema contract：status=`ACTION_VALUE_MATRIX_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；future outcome 只用于 ex-post label 生成；输出 probe/date/state action-value、data quality status 和 fixed safety fields|用冻结 dynamic probes 的未来 outcome 构造 action-value matrix，作为 trend label 输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Action-value 高分不是交易信号；它只用于校准第一层 label，不允许直接排名仓位。|
|`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/single_probe_trend_labels.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/consensus_trend_labels.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/consensus_trend_label_summary.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/consensus_trend_label_quality_review.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Action-value matrix、consensus label policy、probe validation result|Schema contract：status=`CONSENSUS_TREND_LABELS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；记录 label_distribution、agreement、conflict/coverage caveats、probe count 和 fixed safety fields|从 single-probe labels 形成 consensus trend labels，并审计 label 质量|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Consensus label 是训练/评估目标，不是 owner approval 或正式 market regime label。|
|`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/pit_feature_matrix.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/feature_availability_report.json`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_feature_pit_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_feature_pit_audit.yaml`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Validated QQQ prices、rates cache、PIT feature rules、feature availability policy|Schema contract：每行必须带 `known_at`、`available_at`、`decision_at`；non-PIT features 必须 blocked；status=`FIRST_LAYER_FEATURE_PIT_AUDIT_READY`；data-quality status 必须披露|构造第一层模型可用的 PIT feature matrix 并审计未来函数边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature matrix 不允许从 future action-value 或未来收益反推 features。|
|`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_trend_scorecard_v1_predictions.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_logistic_v1/model_coefficients.json`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/models/first_layer_logistic_v1/walk_forward_predictions.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/walk_forward/first_layer_walk_forward_metrics.json`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_trend_model_walk_forward_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_trend_model_walk_forward_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends full-pack`|PIT feature matrix、consensus labels、scorecard policy、walk-forward split policy|Schema contract：status=`FIRST_LAYER_WALK_FORWARD_REVIEW_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；模型输出只含 trend_state/confidence/validity_days/decay_profile；walk-forward metrics 和 split evidence 必须披露|评估低复杂度第一层 trend calibration 是否在 walk-forward 中有稳定 edge|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Walk-forward 分数即使改善也不是 paper-shadow readiness；它还必须通过 probe actual-path diagnostics 和 owner review。|
|`outputs/research_trends/probe_backtest/old_first_layer_vs_new_first_layer_actual_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/probe_backtest/probe_level_metrics.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_trends/calibrated_first_layer_actual_path_rebacktest/probe_level_metrics.csv`<br/>`docs/research/calibrated_first_layer_defensive_overlay_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/calibrated_first_layer_risk_on_tqqq_diagnostic_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/single_probe_vs_consensus_trend_label_review.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Frozen dynamic probes、scorecard/logistic first-layer predictions、validated price cache、probe actual-path execution policy|Schema contract：status=`CALIBRATED_FIRST_LAYER_PROBE_BACKTEST_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；actual-path diagnostics only；TQQQ risk-on probe remains research-only；target-path diagnostic-only；fixed safety fields|把校准后的第一层 trend state 插回冻结 dynamic probes，比较 overlay、TQQQ 和 consensus label 诊断结果|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Probe backtest 不是新策略 promotion；TQQQ row 只诊断 risk-on behavior，不批准 TQQQ 使用。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/calibrated_first_layer_forward_watch_plan.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_final_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_policy_aware_calibration_closeout.md`|`aits research trends full-pack`|Label quality、PIT audit、walk-forward review、probe backtest、overlay/TQQQ/consensus reviews|Schema contract：final status 当前为 `FIRST_LAYER_CALIBRATION_NO_MATERIAL_IMPROVEMENT_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker 全部 false/none；forward watch plan 只列 research evidence requirements|给 owner 汇总第一层 trend calibration 的证据、失败/缺口和后续观察条件|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Owner pack 和 watch plan 不是 owner approval、scheduler activation 或 production change。|

## TRADING-1616～1645 First-Layer Up-State Learning Repair

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`docs/research/first_layer_up_state_failure_diagnosis.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_up_state_failure_diagnosis.yaml`|`aits research trends up-state-repair`|上一批 consensus labels、flat walk-forward predictions、flat probe backtest、dynamic probe registry|Schema contract：status=`FIRST_LAYER_UP_STATE_FAILURE_DIAGNOSIS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；披露 probe roles、QQQ-equivalent exposure、label/prediction distribution、upper-state gap、actual-path deterioration 和 fixed safety fields|正式固化 first-layer five-class collapse 失败原因|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Failure diagnosis 不是重启 promotion；它只定义 repair input。|
|`outputs/research_trends/trend_labels/hierarchical_trend_labels.csv`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/hierarchical_trend_label_summary.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/upper_state_label_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/upper_state_label_audit.yaml`|`aits research trends up-state-repair`|Consensus labels、walk-forward split policy、upper-state label policy|Schema contract：label summary status=`HIERARCHICAL_TREND_LABELS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`，audit status=`UPPER_STATE_LABEL_AUDIT_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；labels include risk_off_binary_label、upper_state_binary_label、three_zone_label、risk_on_severity_label；split audit 必须披露 train/validation upper-state counts 和 collapse risk|把 constructive+risk_on 合并为 upper_state，并审计 split 覆盖|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Upper-state label 存在不代表上行可交易；它仍需 walk-forward 和 actual-path 证明。|
|`outputs/research_trends/pit_feature_matrix/pit_feature_matrix_v2.csv`<br/>`docs/research/up_state_feature_expansion_review.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_feature_pit_audit_v2.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_feature_pit_audit_v2.yaml`|`aits research trends up-state-repair`|Validated QQQ prices、rates cache、PIT feature expansion policy|Schema contract：每个 feature 记录 family、known_at、available_at、PIT_status、missing_rate、split_coverage；non-PIT unavailable families stay excluded|补充趋势持续、波动压缩和回撤修复类上行识别特征|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature v2 不允许使用 SMH/SOXX/AI basket/VIX/breadth 等未在本缓存通过 PIT 的数据。|

|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_frozen_probe_actual_path_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_frozen_probe_actual_path_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_failure_attribution.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_failure_attribution.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_owner_review_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_label_feature_model_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_label_feature_model_final_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-v2-reset`|Composer v2 predictions、frozen probe registry v2、prior flat/hierarchical reference rows、coverage audit|Schema contract：actual-path rows include 8 probes and date_start/date_end; final status currently `WINDOW_COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE`; next action=`REBUILD_WALK_FORWARD_COVERAGE_BEFORE_OWNER_ESCALATION`; promotion/paper-shadow/production/broker remain blocked/false/false/none|接回 frozen probes 做 actual-path v3，并把 coverage blocker、failure attribution 和 owner decision pack 固化|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|8/8 relative improvement cannot override incomplete prediction coverage; this is research-only evidence, not paper-shadow or production readiness.|

## TRADING-1766～1785 First-Layer Walk-Forward Coverage Rebuild

|产物|生成命令|上游输入|Schema / 安全契约|用途|production 影响|常见误解|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|`config/research/first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_policy_v2.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_feature_optionalization_policy.yaml`<br/>`config/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_aware_selection_rule.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|TRADING-1736～1765 coverage blocker、frozen `dynamic_second_layer_probe_registry_v2`、primary research window policy|Schema contract：`schema_version` / `status=pilot_baseline` configs; coverage variants 必须包含 `wf_504d_baseline`、`wf_378d_initial`、`wf_252d_initial`、`wf_expanding_initial`、`wf_warm_start_diagnostic`；coverage pass 要求 first prediction <= `2022-03-01`；feature optionalization 禁止 future data fill；selection rule 要求 coverage、actual-path、defensive probe、net-of-cost、2022 slice 和 same-risk reporting|把 2023-02-22 prediction start blocker 改写成可审计的 coverage policy and selection rule|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Coverage policy 存在不代表 promotion；warm-start 只可 diagnostic，不可 owner review 或 promotion。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_blocker_diagnosis.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_blocker_diagnosis.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_simulation.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_simulation_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|Threshold policy v2、action-value horizon、PIT feature matrix v3、primary labels、coverage policy v2|Schema contract：`report_type=first_layer_v2_coverage_blocker_diagnosis` / `report_type=first_layer_walk_forward_coverage_simulation_matrix`；status 分别为 `FIRST_LAYER_V2_COVERAGE_BLOCKER_DIAGNOSIS_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED` / `FIRST_LAYER_WALK_FORWARD_COVERAGE_SIMULATION_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；必须解释 baseline first prediction=`2023-02-22`；每个 coverage policy row 输出 first train/validation/prediction date、2022 coverage、risk-off/recovery coverage、coverage pass 和 block reason|拆清楚旧 504d rolling window 为什么错过 2022，并模拟较短初始窗口/expanding window 是否补齐 coverage|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`wf_252d_initial` 和 `wf_expanding_initial` 覆盖通过只说明可评价 2022，不说明 actual-path 仍占优。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_early_feature_coverage_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_early_feature_coverage_audit.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_model_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_model_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|PIT feature matrix/report、feature optionalization policy、upper-state labels v2、coverage variants、composer v2 config|Schema contract：`report_type=first_layer_v2_early_feature_coverage_audit` / `report_type=first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_model_matrix`；status 分别为 `EARLY_FEATURE_COVERAGE_PASS` / `FIRST_LAYER_V2_COVERAGE_REBUILD_MODEL_MATRIX_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；core features cannot be optionalized; optional fills must be neutral PIT fills with missing indicator; model rows disclose first_prediction_date、prediction count、coverage pass and safety boundary|确认 early 2021/2022 features 不是 blocker，并训练 coverage-aware first-layer model variants|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Feature optionalization pass 不是新增外部数据源批准，也不允许 future fill 或目标路径调参。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_policy_actual_path_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_policy_actual_path_matrix.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_2022_stress_recovery_slice_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_2022_slice_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|Coverage policy composer predictions、validated QQQ/SGOV/TQQQ prices、frozen probe registry v2、same-risk frontier matrix、2022 risk-off/recovery slice policy|Schema contract：`report_type=first_layer_v2_coverage_policy_actual_path_matrix` / `report_type=first_layer_v2_2022_slice_matrix`；status 分别为 `FIRST_LAYER_V2_COVERAGE_POLICY_ACTUAL_PATH_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED` / `FIRST_LAYER_V2_2022_STRESS_RECOVERY_SLICE_READY_PROMOTION_BLOCKED`；actual-path rows include probe_count=8, improved probe count, defensive regression, net-of-cost proxy, same-risk reporting, 2022 slice gate and selection pass; target-path metrics cannot pass|把 coverage variants 接回 frozen probes，检查覆盖 2022 后 actual-path 是否仍可 owner review|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|旧 baseline 8/8 improvement 因 coverage late 不能用；覆盖通过的 `wf_252d_initial` / `wf_expanding_initial` 当前被 defensive probe regression 阻断。|
|`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_failure_attribution.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_failure_attribution.yaml`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_coverage_rebuild_owner_pack.md`<br/>`docs/research/first_layer_v2_walk_forward_coverage_rebuild_closeout.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/first_layer_v2_walk_forward_coverage_rebuild_final_matrix.yaml`|`aits research trends first-layer-coverage-rebuild`|Coverage blocker, simulation, early feature audit, actual-path review and 2022 slice review|Schema contract：failure attribution must output policy-level reasons; current primary reason=`DEFENSIVE_PROBE_REGRESSION`; final status=`COVERAGE_REBUILD_SUCCESS_ACTION_PATH_NO_LONGER_IMPROVES`; owner review remains false and promotion blocked|形成 coverage rebuild 的 owner-facing closeout，说明 coverage blocker 已解决但 actual-path edge 未保留|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Coverage rebuild success 不等于 first-layer v2 promotion；当前 next action 是保持 blocked，而不是 owner approval、paper-shadow 或 production。|

## TRADING-1165～1186 Dynamic Strategy Execution Semantics

research strategies execution-semantics-rebacktest --policy-registry config/research/strategy_execution_policy_registry.yaml --signal-validity-taxonomy config/research/signal_validity_taxonomy.yaml --enable-staleness-filter --include-repaired-watch-only --emit-staleness-decomposition --emit-lag-decomposition --output-root outputs/research_strategies/execution_semantics`|TRADING-1201～1285 actual-path runtime artifacts、`inputs/research_reviews/dynamic_actual_path_owner_review_decision.yaml`、`inputs/research_reviews/dynamic_actual_path_policy_sensitivity_matrix.yaml`、`config/research/strategy_execution_policy_registry.yaml`、validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV cached data|Schema contract：taxonomy 使用 `signal_validity_taxonomy_v1`，包含 fast/medium/slow/persistent regime classes、strategy profile、stale action 和 fixed safety boundary；actual-path rows 显式记录 `signal_generation_date`、`signal_observation_date`、`advisory_generation_date`、`advisory_effective_date`、`first_executable_date`、`actual_execution_date`、`position_effective_date`、`signal_age_at_execution_days`、`near_stale_signal` 和 `staleness_filter_suppressed`；decomposition 输出 `signal_staleness_decomposition.v1`、`execution_lag_decomposition.v1`；matrix 使用 `staleness_repair_matrix.v1`，只允许 watch-only verdicts，dynamic promotion final status 固定 `BLOCKED`|只对 `limited_adjustment` 与 `dynamic_v0_5_ai_trend_confirmed_only` 及其 repaired watch-only variants 分解 signal staleness / execution lag，判断是否值得后续 owner review 或 paper-shadow preflight discussion|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`WATCH_ONLY_REPAIRED_CANDIDATE` 不是 promotion candidate；即使 matrix 输出 `CANDIDATE_IDENTIFIED`，下一步也只是 owner-controlled `PAPER_SHADOW_PREFLIGHT`，不是 paper-shadow、production、broker 或动态 promotion。|

`RISK_TIMING_QUALITY_REVIEW_READY_WITH_BLOCKERS` 或 `RISK_TIMING_QUALITY_BLOCKED`，记录 risk-off entry delay/avoided loss/false-positive cost、risk-on exit delay/missed upside/false recovery cost、post 5d/20d returns、verdict（`RISK_OFF_TIMING_USEFUL`、`RISK_OFF_TOO_LATE`、`RISK_OFF_TOO_NOISY`、`RISK_ON_TOO_SLOW`、`RISK_ON_TOO_FAST`、`TIMING_EDGE_NOT_ESTABLISHED`）、artifact sha256、`dynamic_promotion=BLOCKED` 和 `target_path_metrics_role=diagnostic_only`|TRADING-1401～1430 event override ex-ante taxonomy / overfit guard 与 risk-off / risk-on timing quality evidence，判断 event override 是否仍有 runtime taxonomy gap、risk timing 是否存在 too noisy/too slow 等 blocker|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Taxonomy PASS 只说明规则模板符合 ex-ante 约束；runtime trace 若缺 event_type/source 等字段仍会阻断 event override preflight。Timing verdict 是 actual-path diagnostic，不是 promotion gate approval；即使出现 useful verdict，也不批准 dynamic promotion、paper-shadow、production、broker/order 或真实交易建议。|

|`config/research/transaction_cost_model.yaml`<br/>`config/research/cash_yield_model.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/cost_cash_yield/*/transaction_cost_cash_yield_matrix.csv`<br/>`docs/research/transaction_cost_cash_yield_audit.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/transaction_cost_cash_yield_matrix.yaml`<br/>`config/research/stress_risk_metrics_policy.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/stress_risk/*/stress_risk_metrics_by_strategy.csv`<br/>`docs/research/stress_risk_metrics_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/stress_risk_metrics_matrix.yaml`<br/>`config/research/regime_baseline_expansion_policy.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/regime_review/*/regime_metrics_by_strategy.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/regime_review/*/expanded_baseline_leaderboard.csv`<br/>`docs/research/regime_segmentation_baseline_expansion_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/regime_baseline_expansion_matrix.yaml`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/artifact_governance/*/artifact_governance_inventory.csv`<br/>`docs/research/research_artifact_governance_review.md`<br/>`inputs/research_reviews/research_artifact_governance_snapshot.yaml`|`aits research strategies transaction-cost-cash-yield-audit`、`aits research strategies stress-risk-metrics-review`、`aits research strategies regime-segmentation-baseline-expansion-review`、`aits research sha256。Cost/cash matrix 使用 `transaction_cost_cash_yield_matrix.v1`，记录 gross vs net return、execution-policy net return、turnover/slippage/cash-yield/SGOV-dividend contribution、model hashes、artifact |`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_real_cli_suite_summary.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_candidate_result_summary.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_tier_validation.json/md`|`aits research strategies growth-tilt-real-cli-suite`、`growth-tilt-candidate-result-summary`、`growth-tilt-tier-validation`|TRADING-1065～1084 Equal-Risk Growth Tilt CLI artifacts, validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV prices/rates through the same cached-data quality gate|Schema contract：real CLI suite rows expose `report_id`、`command`、`status`、warnings/blockers、artifact paths、data-quality status、candidate count、top candidate/family、highest tier and safety fields；candidate summary groups top return edge/gap reduction/Calmar/Sharpe/low drawdown/low turnover, `candidate_by_family` and `rejected_by_family`；tier validation maps candidates to `GROWTH_TILT_CANDIDATE` / `GROWTH_CHALLENGER` / `COMPONENT_READY_GROWTH` / `NO_USEFUL_GROWTH_TILT`|把已实现 growth tilt 搜索结果转成真实运行摘要、候选汇总和 Tier 复核输入|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|real-run PASS/WARN 只说明 research artifacts 已生成；Tier 命名不是 paper-shadow、production 或交易许可。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_beta_adjusted_edge_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_risk_return_frontier_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_period_drawdown_cost_triage.json/md`|`aits research strategies growth-tilt-beta-adjusted-edge-review`、`growth-tilt-risk-return-frontier-review`、`growth-tilt-period-drawdown-cost-triage`|candidate summary、ranking/tiering、period replay、cost sensitivity、benchmarks `equal_risk_qqq_sgov` / `100_qqq` / `qqq_50_sgov_50` / `qqq_60_sgov_40`|Schema contract：beta status 为 `BETA_ADJUSTED_EDGE_MATERIAL` / `BETA_ADJUSTED_EDGE_PRESENT` / `BETA_EXPLAINS_EDGE` / `EDGE_WEAK_AFTER_PENALTY` / `BETA_ADJUSTED_EDGE_BLOCKED`，并 reports raw return edge, effective beta/leverage, beta-adjusted return/Sharpe/Calmar edge, drawdown/turnover/TQQQ path dependency penalties and benchmark comparisons；frontier status 为 `GROWTH_TILT_FRONTIER_READY` / `BALANCED_CORE_FRONTIER_FOUND` / `NO_USEFUL_GROWTH_TILT_FRONTIER` / `GROWTH_TILT_FRONTIER_BLOCKED`，并 reports return-vs-drawdown/Calmar/Sharpe/turnover frontiers, dominated/non-dominated rows and role suggestions；triage status 为 `GROWTH_TILT_TRIAGE_PASS` / `GROWTH_TILT_TRIAGE_WARN` / `GROWTH_TILT_REGIME_CONCENTRATED` / `GROWTH_TILT_DRAWDOWN_RISK_TOO_HIGH` / `GROWTH_TILT_COST_BLOCKED` / `GROWTH_TILT_TRIAGE_BLOCKED`，覆盖 2022 bear, 2023 recovery, 2024 AI rally, 2025-to-latest, largest drawdowns and high-rate SGOV carry period|判断收益提升是否只是 beta，候选在 risk-return frontier 上是否有位置，以及 period/drawdown/cost 是否阻塞|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|`BETA_ADJUSTED_EDGE_PRESENT` 或 frontier role 不等于有效策略批准；triage WARN 必须随 owner review 披露。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_final_gate.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_forward_aging_watchlist_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_owner_decision_pack_real_run.json/md`<br/>`docs/research/growth_tilt_owner_decision_pack_real_run.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/growth_tilt_real_result_master_review.json/md`<br/>`docs/research/growth_tilt_real_result_master_review.md`|`aits research strategies growth-tilt-vs-equal-risk-and-qqq-final-gate`、`growth-tilt-forward-aging-watchlist-review`、`growth-tilt-owner-decision-pack-real-run`、`growth-tilt-real-result-master-review`|1085-style real-run summary artifacts above, definition lock, readiness gate, owner/source docs and current roadmap state|Schema contract：final gate outputs `candidate_strategy_id`、highest gate passed、blocking/warning reasons、recommended role and `forward_aging_review_allowed`；watchlist review allows at most one research-only candidate and keeps owner manual review required；owner/master docs answer Tier 1/2/3 existence, best candidate, equal-risk and QQQ comparison, beta-only risk, drawdown/Calmar/Sharpe/turnover acceptability, watchlist reviewability, equal-risk defensive-primary status and no paper-shadow/no production/no broker continuation|形成真实运行后的 owner decision pack 和 master review，决定是否只进入 research-only forward-aging watchlist review 或继续保持 research-only/暂停|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|watchlist reviewable 不会写 observation、不接入正式 Reader Brief、不修改 production config、不生成真实交易建议；owner manual review 仍是硬边界。|

|`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_scope_contract.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/static_baseline_external_reconciliation.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/metric_definition_reconciliation.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/sgov_total_return_external_check.json/md`|`aits research strategies external-validation-scope-contract`、`static-baseline-external-reconciliation`、`metric-definition-reconciliation`、`sgov-total-return-external-check`|TRADING-1119～1128 balanced-core launch state、P0 static baselines `100_qqq` / `qqq_50_sgov_50` / `qqq_60_sgov_40`、validated QQQ/TQQQ/SGOV prices/rates、manual external static baseline records when supplied|Schema contract：scope 固定 `strategy_ids`、validation lanes、metric tolerances、AI regime and requested date range；static reconciliation 输出 internal/external annual return、max drawdown、Sharpe、Calmar、monthly correlation、`external_record_status` and tolerance rows；metric reconciliation records annual return, max drawdown, Sharpe, Calmar, rebalance and monthly return definitions；SGOV check reports close-vs-adjusted-close return gap and strategy-level annual-return impact；所有 payload 固定 `paper_shadow_allowed=false`、`production_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`、`manual_review_required=true`|建立外部验证范围、静态基准人工外部记录需求、指标定义和 SGOV total-return 处理边界|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|外部记录缺失时状态只能是 pending/warnings，不能把 internal metrics 当成外部证据；SGOV adjusted close proxy warning 不是可忽略误差，也不是交易许可。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/strategy_weight_path_export.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/weight_paths/equal_risk_qqq_sgov_weight_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/weight_paths/equal_risk_growth_tilt_vol_target_v1_tv4_w120_q7_s1_weight_path.csv`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_independent_return_replay.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_platform_feasibility_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/quantconnect_replication_dry_run_plan.json/md`|`aits research strategies strategy-weight-path-export`、`external-independent-return-replay`、`external-platform-feasibility-review`、`quantconnect-replication-dry-run-plan`|`config/research/simple_baseline_strategy_registry.yaml`、`config/research/equal_risk_growth_tilt_candidate_registry.yaml`、definition lock、validated prices/rates、weight path CSVs generated by the same export step|Schema contract：weight CSV fields include `date`、`strategy_id`、`definition_hash`、`target_weight_qqq`、`target_weight_tqqq`、`target_weight_sgov`、`rebalance_flag`、`signal_time`、`execution_assumption`、`data_quality_status`；independent replay uses shifted exported weights and adjusted close returns, then compares annual return、max drawdown、Sharpe、Calmar、turnover and monthly correlation against internal metrics；feasibility and QuantConnect dry-run plan list required external data handling, unsupported assumptions, manual confirmations and no-broker dry-run steps|为 P1/P2 dynamic strategies 提供可导出、可复算、可外部平台手工复核的权重与回报链路|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|导出的 target weights 是 backtest/replay 输入，不是 official target weights 或实盘仓位；QuantConnect plan 是 dry-run checklist，不连接 broker、不提交订单、不批准 paper-shadow。|

|`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_real_result_status_reader.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/static_baseline_reconciliation_final_check.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/dynamic_weight_path_replay_final_check.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/metric_sgov_reconciliation_signoff.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/external_validation/external_validation_to_launch_gate.json/md`|`aits research strategies external-validation-real-result-status-reader`、`static-baseline-reconciliation-final-check`、`dynamic-weight-path-replay-final-check`、`metric-and-sgov-reconciliation-signoff`、`external-validation-to-launch-gate`|TRADING-1129～1140 real external validation artifacts、static baseline external/manual records、dynamic weight-path export/replay、metric reconciliation、SGOV total-return check、difference attribution、balanced-core definition lock|Schema contract：status 覆盖 `EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_RESULT_READY/WARN/BLOCKED/MISSING`、`STATIC_BASELINE_FINAL_RECONCILED/WARN/MISMATCH/BLOCKED`、`DYNAMIC_REPLAY_FINAL_MATCHED/WARN/MISMATCH/BLOCKED`、`METRIC_SGOV_SIGNOFF_READY/WARN/BLOCKED`、`EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_LAUNCH_GATE_PASS/WARN/BLOCKED`；gate 输出 `launch_allowed`、`launch_scope`、blocking/warning reasons、required owner review、candidate definition hash 和固定 safety fields|把外部验证真实结果收口为 balanced-core research-only launch gate|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Launch gate 通过只允许 research-only forward-aging observation，不是 paper-shadow、production、broker 或交易建议许可；static external record 缺失只能 warning/blocked，不得伪造成外部验证通过。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/balanced_core_launch_preflight.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/forward_aging_observations/balanced_core_forward_aging_observation_<date>.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/balanced_core_first_observation_write_after_validation.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/growth_components/balanced_core_observation_idempotency_proof.json/md`|`aits research strategies balanced-core-launch-preflight`、`balanced-core-first-observation-write-after-validation`、`balanced-core-observation-idempotency-proof`|external validation launch gate、balanced-core definition lock、data quality gate、balanced-core dry-run, existing observation files|Schema contract：preflight checks candidate id/role, definition hash, launch gate status, data quality, decision date, same-day observation, comparator weights；write-after-validation records external validation status and data quality status on the append-only observation when newly written；idempotency proof maps repeated same-date writes to already-exists and confirms target weights, definition hash and comparator fields are preserved|安全写入或复核 balanced-core 第一条 research-only observation|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Observation target weights 仍是研究记录，不是实盘仓位；同日 observation 已存在时不得覆盖原文件。|
|`outputs/research_strategies/roadmap/dual_forward_panel_after_launch.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/roadmap/dual_forward_aging_scoreboard_safety_review.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/roadmap/dual_forward_aging_reader_brief_after_launch_safe_preview.json/md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/roadmap/balanced_core_launch_owner_report.json`<br/>`docs/research/balanced_core_launch_owner_report.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/roadmap/external_validation_balanced_core_launch_master_review.json`<br/>`docs/research/external_validation_balanced_core_launch_master_review.md`<br/>`outputs/research_strategies/roadmap/dual_forward_aging_monthly_monitor_contract.json`<br/>`docs/research/dual_forward_aging_monthly_monitor_contract.md`|`aits research strategies dual-forward-aging-comparator-panel-after-launch`、`dual-forward-aging-scoreboard-safety-review`、`dual-forward-aging-reader-brief-safe-preview-after-launch`、`balanced-core-launch-owner-report`、`external-validation-balanced-core-launch-master-review`、`dual-forward-aging-monthly-monitor-contract`|balanced-core observation files、dual panel、scoreboard maturity gate、external validation launch gate、Reader Brief preview safety scan|Schema contract：after-launch panel rows include defensive primary, balanced-core candidate, `100_qqq`, `qqq_50_sgov_50`, `qqq_60_sgov_40`, target weights, definition hash, matured 5/10/20/60/120d returns, scoreboard status and data quality status；scoreboard review forbids strong conclusions under insufficient samples；Reader Brief preview permits only research-only status and safety flags；owner/master answer launch and no paper-shadow/no production/no broker questions；monthly contract fixes sample-discipline rules|形成 balanced-core after-launch owner report、master review 和后续月度 monitor 契约|否，`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none`|Monthly monitor 不是 scheduler production entry，也不允许因单个 5d/10d window 调整策略状态或进入 paper-shadow review。|

## Research Campaign Control Plane

TRADING-605～630 的 Campaign 控制面 artifact 位于 `data/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/` 和 `outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/`。`data/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/spec.json` 是初始化后规范化的 Campaign Spec；`state.json` 是 canonical campaign status；`evidence.jsonl` 是统一 Evidence Record store；`transitions.jsonl` 是状态机 audit log；`runs.jsonl` 是 stage runner / adapter 审计；`reproducibility_manifest.json` 记录 commit、spec/config checksums、windows、outputs 和 data quality status；`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/owner_packet_<campaign_id>.json/md` 是 Campaign Reader Brief / owner packet。生成入口是 `aits research campaign init|validate|validate-adapters|plan|run|diagnose|gate|status|packet|archive|validation-pack`，上游配置为 `config/research/module_capability_registry.yaml`、`config/research/research_window_policy.yaml`、`config/research/research_gate_policies.yaml`、`config/research/campaign_migrations.yaml`、`config/research/campaign_stage_adapters.yaml` 和 sample specs。TRADING-623～630 新增 `outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_campaign_adapter_run_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`b3_campaign_signal_precheck_run.json/md` 以及 `outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_validation/b2_campaign_adapter_parity_map.json/md`、`b2_campaign_parity_validation.json/md`、`evidence_budget_enforcement_report.json/md`、`campaign_next_action_parity_review.json/md`、`campaign_control_plane_v1_validation_pack.json/md`。该 artifact family 只控制研究工作流、adapter 输入校验、预算、holdout policy、module boundary、gate 和 next actions；不刷新市场数据、不运行 broker/order、不写 official target weights、不 append owner decision、不创建 paper-shadow、不修改 production。B2/B3 迁移 evidence 与 audited-artifact adapter evidence 是 historical/audited research input，不代表批准 current-form 研究结论。

TRADING-631～640 在同一 artifact family 中新增 execution adapter rc2 产物。`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_compute/` 保存 B2 control-window compute adapter 生成的 rerun JSON/Markdown 与 component CSV；`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b3_signal_compute/` 保存 B3 signal-only compute adapter 生成的 taxonomy/precheck JSON/Markdown；adapter run JSON/Markdown 明确 `run_mode`、`compute_performed`、`imported_evidence`、`parity_source`、`failure_mode` 和 `holdout_touched=false`。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc2_validation/` 新增 `b2_compute_adapter_smoke.*`、`b2_compute_parity_validation.*`、`campaign_run_next_stage_smoke.*`、`evidence_budget_forced_transition_report.*`、`b3_signal_compute_adapter_smoke.*`、`campaign_status_plan_ux_report.*` 和 `case_specific_runner_deprecation_plan.*`。这些 rc2 artifacts 只证明 Campaign 至少能执行一个 B2 safe diagnostic compute path 和一个 B3 signal-only smoke path；不表示 B2 current-form 已可推广，不替代所有旧 runner，不批准 B4/B5/B6/v3、paper-shadow/live、official target weights、broker/order 或 production mutation。

TRADING-641～648 新增 execution adapter rc3 产物。`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_targeted_compute/` 保存 B2 targeted-evidence compute JSON/Markdown 与其 control-window 子目录；`outputs/research_campaigns/<campaign_id>/b2_full_compute/` 保存 B2 full diagnostic compute JSON/Markdown 与 control-window 子目录；GATE adapter run artifact 记录 constrained B2 decision、budget status 和 owner-override reason codes。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc3_validation/` 新增 `b2_targeted_evidence_compute_adapter.*`、`b2_targeted_evidence_compute_parity.*`、`b2_full_diagnostic_compute_adapter.*`、`b2_gate_compute_adapter.*`、`b2_campaign_e2e_compute.*`、`b2_campaign_full_parity_validation.*`、`campaign_evidence_budget_final_decision_drill.*` 和 `legacy_b2_runner_deprecation_readiness.*`。这些 rc3 artifacts 证明 B2 targeted/full/gate 可经 Campaign compute path 运行或给出 owner-override limitation；仍不批准 B4/B5/B6/v3、paper-shadow/live、official target weights、broker/order、untouched holdout access 或 production mutation，也不删除 legacy B2 task-specific runners。

TRADING-649～653 新增 B2 finalization rc4 产物。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc4_validation/` 新增 `campaign_b2_next_action_freeze.*`、`campaign_managed_b2_final_repeatability_run.*`、`campaign_b2_final_gate.*`、`campaign_b2_owner_review_packet.*` 和 `campaign_b2_branch_finalization.*`。这些 artifacts 冻结 B2 当前 Campaign 状态、通过 Campaign `run --stage next` 执行最后 targeted repeatability、用 gate policy 输出 final taxonomy、生成 owner review packet，并固定 B4/B5/B6/v3/paper-shadow 继续关闭。它们不 append owner decision、不访问 untouched holdout、不调参数、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-654～660 新增 B2 post-campaign rc5 产物。`data/research_campaigns/b2-risk-overlay-current-form/owner_decisions.jsonl` 是 B2 owner decision audit log；canonical `state.json` 在 owner `return_to_design` 后进入 `ARCHIVED + RETURNED_TO_DESIGN`，但 `evidence.jsonl`、`transitions.jsonl` 和 source lineage 保留。`outputs/research_campaigns/control_plane_v1_rc5_validation/` 新增 `campaign_b2_owner_decision_record.*`、`b2_current_form_campaign_archive.*`、`campaign_b2_reusable_evidence_report.*`、`slow_drawdown_defensive_overlay_rfc.*`、`reentry_policy_design_contract.*`、`fast_shock_trigger_feasibility_rfc.*` 和 `post_b2_campaign_program_snapshot.*`。这些 artifacts 只记录 current B2 form returned-to-design、归档 lineage、可复用/不可复用 evidence 分类和后续窄化 redesign planning；三个 RFC/contract 不实现 module 行为、不运行 backfill、不生成 weights。归档后的 Campaign next-stage runner 只返回 archived no-op；B4/B5/B6/v3、paper-shadow/extended/live、official target weights、broker/order、untouched holdout 和 production mutation 全部继续禁止。

## Indicator-to-Signal Research Framework

TRADING-665～692 的 indicator research artifact family 位于 `outputs/research_indicators/`，validation pack 位于 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/`。Source configuration 是 `config/research/indicator_research_registry.yaml`，它登记日报评分模块、估值拥挤、风险事件、confidence/data-quality/thesis/portfolio/execution guardrails 的 ontology、role、mapping version、data/PIT gate、coverage status、expected impact、dependency edge 和 research stage。生成入口是 `aits research indicators ontology|inventory|coverage|coverage-gap|graph|trace-contract|diagnose|mapping-plan|masking|gate|valuation-crowding-pilot|masking-casebook|ablation-validation|masking-effectiveness-review|masking-robustness-review|validation-rollup|outcome-availability-audit|historical-trace-validation|gate-availability-audit|component-historical-trace|backtest-trace-bridge|lineage-manifest-repair|validation-pack|validation-pack-stability`；核心 artifacts 包括 `daily_indicator_inventory.json/md`、`indicator_research_coverage_audit.json/md`、`daily_indicator_coverage_gap_report.json/md`、`indicator_dependency_graph.json/md`、`multi_stage_weight_trace_contract.json/md`、`constraint_attribution_report.json/md`、`indicator_signal_mapping_registry.json/md`、`mapping_free_indicator_diagnostics_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`indicator_mapping_candidate_plan_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`indicator_masking_and_dominance_audit_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`indicator_to_signal_research_gate_<indicator_id>.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_pilot_audit.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_outcome_availability_audit.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_effectiveness_review.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_robustness_review.json/md`、`indicator_research_validation_rollup.json/md`、`historical_trace_gate_availability_audit.json/md`、`component_level_historical_trace.json/md`、`backtest_trace_bridge.json/md`、`lineage_manifest_repair_report.json/md`、`indicator_to_signal_research_framework_v1_validation_pack.json/md` 和 `indicator_validation_pack_rerun_stability_report.json/md`。这些 artifacts 的用途是先确认“指标存在、是否进入日报、是否影响 signal/weight、是否是 hard constraint、是否高影响未验证、是否遮蔽下游信号”，而不是证明指标已经有效。

`aits score-daily` 现在在既有评分报告生成后额外写出 `outputs/reports/daily_indicator_weight_trace_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`（可用 `--daily-indicator-weight-trace-path` 重定向）。该 trace 从已计算完成的 `DailyScoreReport` 派生，记录 raw indicator value、normalized indicator score、mapped signal contribution、pre-constraint signal weight、post-constraint signal weight、final advisory/portfolio-facing weight，以及每个 position gate 的 before/after/delta 和 valuation/crowding -> trend masking fields；它不重新计算 score、不修改 weights/gates、不写 official target weights、不触发 paper-shadow/live/broker/order，固定 `production_effect=none`。Indicator research artifacts 可读取该 trace 来计算 dominance、constraint attribution 和 masking ratio；未提供 trace 时必须显示 `TRACE_DATA_REQUIRED`，并把 valuation/crowding pilot 输出为 `VALUATION_CROWDING_UNTESTED_HIGH_IMPACT`，不得补造 hit rate、weight suppression、constraint drag 或 masking ratio。`daily_indicator_coverage_gap_report` 列出 registered indicators、未登记但日报中出现的 component、已登记但缺 source/constraint/mapping/dependency/trace_contract 的指标和 HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED 指标。`config/research/module_capability_registry.yaml` 和 `config/research/campaign_stage_adapters.yaml` 登记了 `indicator-research-framework-v1` 与 validation-only adapter contract，说明该框架可进入 Research Campaign 控制面的审计/契约层；当前 adapter 不运行大规模 backfill 或 indicator search。所有 indicator artifacts 固定 `research_only=true`、`manual_review_only=true`、`official_target_weights=false`、`paper_shadow_activation=false`、`broker_effect=none`、`order_effect=none`、`production_effect=none`，不得修改日报实际权重逻辑、估值拥挤 cap、production 参数、paper-shadow/live/broker/order 或 owner decision。

TRADING-665～692 后续 VALIDATING 诊断新增 `valuation_crowding_pilot_validation_report.json/md`、`indicator_masking_casebook_valuation_crowding_trend.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_ablation_validation.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_outcome_availability_audit.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_effectiveness_review.json/md`、`valuation_crowding_masking_robustness_review.json/md`、`indicator_research_validation_rollup.json/md`、`historical_multi_stage_weight_trace_validation.json/md`、`historical_trace_gate_availability_audit.json/md`、`component_level_historical_trace.json/md`、`backtest_trace_bridge.json/md` 和 `lineage_manifest_repair_report.json/md`。Pilot validation report 记录 valuation/crowding 指标定义、raw value 来源、normalization、mapping 方向、生效阈值、与 trend 的 MASKS 关系、为何仍是 `HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED` 以及为何当前 trace 产生 `HIGH_MASKING`。Masking casebook 列出具体日期/样本、trend 与 valuation/crowding 原始方向、pre/post-mask signal、final advisory-facing weight、1d/5d/10d/20d outcome、drawdown_reduced、missed_upside 和 false_risk_off。Outcome availability audit 统一 casebook、ablation scenario 和 backtest bridge 的 realized outcome join key：`as_of_date`、`decision_time`、`asset`、`scenario`、`trace_source`、`trace_contract_version`；signal generation 继续保持 PIT/as-of，realized outcome 只在 evaluation 阶段读取 decision_time 之后的价格，1d/5d/10d/20d 使用交易日窗口，且每个 horizon 独立执行 evaluation cutoff：只有 `as_of_date + horizon trading days <= latest_available_price_date` 才计入 mature，否则标记 `outcome_not_mature` 且不计入 hard missing。Outcome audit 还输出 horizon-specific mature/not-mature counts、mature outcome sample quality、by-asset/by-date/by-regime/by-event-window availability，以及 full_advisory/component_only/backtest_bridge mature counts by horizon。Ablation validation 和 masking effectiveness review 只读比较 baseline、no valuation/crowding masking 和 capped masking，不写 production 权重，并按 full_advisory_only、component_only、backtest_bridge、date、asset、regime、event window、correlated asset cluster 和 horizon 分层输出 avg return、median return、hit rate、downside capture、horizon-level max drawdown、drawdown preservation、turnover、constraint hit、date_count、asset_count、case_count、unique_regime_count 和 correlated_asset_cluster_count；同时输出 scenario × horizon conclusion matrix，逐行记录 sample quality、return profile、risk profile、false risk-off、missed upside 和 recommendation contribution。Robustness review 在该 matrix 上只读输出 scenario delta matrix、equal-weight by date/asset/correlated cluster aggregation、full_advisory_only 与 all_validation_sources 一致性、case diagnostics、10d baseline support attribution、1d/5d neutral/incomplete explanation、20d pending maturity tracker 和 conservative evidence gate；只有 1d/5d/10d 至少两个 horizon 一致、full advisory/date/cluster 聚合不冲突且 missed_upside/false_risk_off 未恶化时，才允许从 preliminary 升级为更强 validation recommendation。Validation rollup 汇总 framework readiness、coverage status、trace status、gate/lineage status、outcome maturity status、valuation/crowding masking current recommendation、remaining limitations、pending maturity tracker、next recommended rerun date 和 rerun criteria；它明确 `valuation_crowding_indicator` 保持 `HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED`、`PRELIMINARY_SHORT_HORIZON_ONLY`、`NO_PROMOTION_ALLOWED`。20d 样本不足时必须标记 `insufficient_long_horizon_evidence`，不得用当前少量 20d full-advisory mature cases 推导正式结论；20d 未成熟或不足不得让 1d/5d/10d 已成熟 outcome 从 review 中消失。Recommendation 只能是 validation recommendation，不能进入 promotion gate；当 1d/5d/10d 结论冲突或不完整时输出 `preliminary_short_horizon_only`。Historical trace validation 可读取由 PIT sliced `score-daily` replay 合并的多日期 trace，用于让 masking/dominance 不只依赖当前日报样本；如果日期数不足、gate audit 不能确认 full advisory eligibility 或 forward outcome 不完整，必须以 `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` 和 issue 明示，不得补造稳定性结论。Gate availability audit 按 date+asset 输出 `full_advisory_trace_eligible`、`component_validation_trace_eligible`、`reason_if_not_full_eligible`、`blocked_gate`、`missing_or_late_feature`、`feature_available_time`、`decision_time`、`reason_class` 和 `can_be_repaired_without_relaxing_production_gate`，并只在 explicit historical replay/lineage manifest 完整且 `production_equivalent=true` 时确认 full advisory equivalence。`lineage_manifest_repair_report` 针对 missing lineage root-cause 输出 affected artifact 的 `source_artifact_path`、`generated_at`、`as_of_date`、`decision_time`、`config_hash`、`input_snapshot_hash`、`trace_contract_version`、`production_equivalent` 和 `manifest_validation_status`；它只能验证或要求重新生成 replay/manifest，不能放宽 production data quality 或 feature gates。Component-level historical trace 只给 valuation/crowding -> trend masking diagnostics 使用；backtest trace bridge 从已有 backtest / historical simulation / advisory outcome artifacts 导出只读桥接记录和 source lineage fields。所有非 full advisory trace 必须带 `trace_source`、`confidence`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false` 和 `allowed_uses=[diagnostic, ablation, sensitivity_analysis]`，不得进入 promotion gate。Validation-pack-stability 现在还检查 trace fields 完整、coverage gap 无新增 unregistered、`HIGH_IMPACT_UNVALIDATED` 清单稳定、masking diagnostics、casebook、outcome availability、effectiveness review、robustness review、validation rollup、gate availability、sample quality、component trace、bridge 和 lineage repair repeatable。

TRADING-693/695/696/697 新增 threshold registry / calibration audit artifact。`config/research/threshold_registry.yaml` 是 validation-only threshold governance registry，覆盖 config、indicator research、validation pack、masking diagnostics、outcome maturity、promotion/robustness gates、backtest/replay/allocation constraints 和 tests 中固化阈值；每条记录包含 value/unit/where_used/purpose/impact/safety/calibration fields、A/B/C 分级和 A 类未校准阈值的 promotion review block 标记。TRADING-696 只新增顶层 `calibration_followup_summary`，记录 `sensitivity_tested_count=5`、`validated_boundary_count=0`、`still_uncalibrated_high_impact_count=31`、`thresholds_still_blocking_promotion_count=36` 和 no-change safety flags，不修改任何 threshold current value；TRADING-697 只新增顶层 `second_batch_calibration_prep_summary`，记录 3 个 dynamic/trend second-batch 阈值已 prepared、`validated_boundary_count=0`、`thresholds_changed_count=0` 和 no-change safety flags。`threshold_registry_audit.json/md` 汇总 `total_threshold_count`、`high_impact_threshold_count`、`uncalibrated_high_impact_count`、`heuristic_guardrail_count`、`calibrated_count`、`thresholds_blocking_promotion`、promotion dependency review blockers 和 calibration backlog。`threshold_prioritization_report.json/md` 基于同一 registry 对 36 个 uncalibrated high-impact thresholds 排序；validation pack summary 同步暴露 `threshold_prioritization_summary`。`threshold_calibration_report.json/md` 只覆盖第一批中的 5 个 indicator research evidence gate 阈值；validation pack summary 同步暴露 `threshold_calibration_summary`。`threshold_calibration_followup_plan.json/md` 从 calibration report 抽取 5 个阈值结果并输出 data gap plan；`recommendation_changed` 只表示 sensitivity 场景下 recommendation 是否变化，不表示 threshold current value 已改变。`dynamic_trend_threshold_calibration_prep_report.json/md` 只覆盖 `dynamic_allocation.risk_off_score_thresholds`、`dynamic_allocation.risk_on_confirmation_thresholds` 和 `trend_calibration.score_bands`，输出 current_value、where_used、decision_affecting_path、tested_values、sensitivity impact、recommendation_by_value、false risk-off/risk-on impact、turnover/constraint-hit impact 和 drawdown/missed-upside impact；所有 recommendation 都是 `collect_evidence_only`，不改 current value，不升级 `VALIDATED_BOUNDARY`，最多允许后续 `SENSITIVITY_TESTED`。`long_horizon_evidence_floor_calibration_audit.json/md` 只读读取 expanded historical trace、outcome availability、masking robustness、gate audit 和 bridge artifacts，对 20/30/50/80/100 full-advisory mature-case floors 重跑 recommendation sensitivity。相关 artifacts 只能用于 diagnostic / ablation / sensitivity / prep analysis，`promotion_gate_allowed=false`，不改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-698 在同一 threshold governance family 中新增 `dynamic_trend_threshold_sensitivity_review.json/md`，入口是 `aits research indicators dynamic-trend-threshold-sensitivity-review`，并由 `aits research indicators validation-pack` 写入 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/dynamic_trend_threshold_sensitivity_review.json/md`。该 artifact 只覆盖 `dynamic_allocation.risk_off_score_thresholds`、`dynamic_allocation.risk_on_confirmation_thresholds` 和 `trend_calibration.score_bands`，输出 current/stricter/relaxed/capped-or-smoothed/no-change variants 的 1d/5d/10d/20d avg return、hit rate、max drawdown、drawdown preservation、turnover、constraint hit、risk-off/risk-on trigger、false risk-off/false risk-on 和 missed-upside metrics，并按 horizon、asset、date、regime、event window、full_advisory_only、component/backtest bridge 和 correlated asset cluster 分层。它必须披露 mature date/case count、full advisory case count、cluster/regime count 和 sample quality breakdown；recommendation 只能是 validation recommendation，不能修改 threshold current value，不能升级 `VALIDATED_BOUNDARY`，不能改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-699 将 `dynamic_trend_threshold_sensitivity_review.json/md` 扩展为可显式传入 `--coverage-extension-root`。该输入读取 research campaign control-window risk signal 和 cached price evidence，生成 `trace_source=backtest_trace_bridge` 的 coverage-extension cases，用于扩大 by asset、correlated asset cluster、realized coverage regime 和 event window 分层；这些 cases 只能提高 validation coverage diagnostics，不会提高 `full_advisory_case_count`，也不能被当作 production-equivalent replay。artifact summary 额外披露 TRADING-698 baseline coverage、coverage targets、coverage target status、case origin counts、trace source counts、coverage extension case count、independent signal date count 和 pending maturity tracker；所有 recommendation 仍是 validation recommendation，不能修改 threshold current value、不能升级 `VALIDATED_BOUNDARY`、不能改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-702 新增 `config/research/pit_feature_availability_contracts.yaml` 和 `pit_source_readiness_audit.json/md`。该 registry 按 feature 记录 source、raw/release/accepted/available/ingestion/decision time、revision policy、snapshot/source manifest policy、risk flags、fail-closed rule 和 repair strategy；audit 读取 historical gate audit / trace lineage，把粗粒度 PIT blockers 细分为 `true_not_available_before_decision_time`、`available_time_missing`、`timestamp_model_too_conservative`、`source_snapshot_missing`、`feature_reconstruction_gap`、`lineage_manifest_missing`、`replay_config_issue`、`calendar_mapping_issue`、`asset_mapping_issue`、`price_window_not_mature`、`vendor_current_view_only` 和 `unknown_requires_manual_review`。validation pack summary 同步暴露 `pit_source_readiness_summary`，并固定 `lookahead_violation_count=0`、`production_effect=none`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_change_allowed=false`、`production_weight_change_allowed=false`。

TRADING-700 在同一 threshold governance family 中新增 `dynamic_trend_bridge_consistency_audit.json/md`，入口是 `aits research indicators dynamic-trend-bridge-consistency-audit`，也由 `aits research indicators validation-pack` 写入 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/dynamic_trend_bridge_consistency_audit.json/md`。该 artifact 读取 TRADING-699 sensitivity review，对 3 个 dynamic/trend threshold 分别比较 `full_advisory_only` 和 `backtest_trace_bridge` source layer，输出 source-layer recommendations、direction agreement、metric deltas、false risk-off/on delta、missed-upside delta、drawdown-preservation delta、turnover delta、constraint-hit delta 和 bridge reliability label。若 full-advisory 样本不足，必须保持 `evidence_strength=low`、`recommendation=sensitivity_tested_only`、`validated_boundary=false`；`backtest_trace_bridge` 不能单独作为 promotion gate evidence，不能修改 threshold current value，不能改变 production / paper-shadow / official weights。

TRADING-701 在同一 threshold governance family 中新增 `dynamic_trend_full_advisory_expansion_report.json/md`，入口是 `aits research indicators dynamic-trend-full-advisory-expansion`，也由 `aits research indicators validation-pack` 写入 `outputs/research_indicators/control_plane_v1_validation/dynamic_trend_full_advisory_expansion_report.json/md`。该 artifact 审计 dynamic/trend threshold calibration 为什么 full-advisory equivalent trace 样本有限，并只在 data quality、PIT feature availability、lineage manifest 和 production-equivalent proof gate 全部满足时，把 historical `score-daily` traces 纳入 rebuilt expanded trace；summary 暴露 requested/eligible/blocked date counts、full_advisory_case_count before/after、blocked_by_reason、repairable_without_relaxing_gate、expected PIT limitation、lineage missing 和 replay config issue。after-expansion consistency audit 仍必须遵守 TRADING-700 reliability floor；full-advisory 不足时保持 `insufficient_full_advisory_to_assess`、`evidence_strength=low`、`recommendation=sensitivity_tested_only` 和 `validated_boundary=false`。该 artifact 只用于 validation-only coverage audit，不修改 threshold current value，不放宽 production gate，不批准 promotion、paper-shadow、production weight 或 official weights。

## ETF Portfolio runtime artifact policy

`data/etf_portfolio/`、`data/simulation/` 和 `reports/` 是本地运行产物目录，默认由 ETF daily run、simulation、backtest、P1/P2 observe-only reports 或 report integration 命令生成，并通过 `.gitignore` 排除在源码提交之外。它们可以作为本机审计证据和人工复核输入，但不是 source artifacts。

ETF deterministic test fixtures 只能提交到 `tests/fixtures/etf_portfolio/`。不要把测试 fixture 放进 `data/` 或 `reports/`，也不要把 daily run 生成的 report 复制成源码 fixture，除非另行建立明确的最小化、脱敏、确定性 fixture。

`config/report_registry.yaml` 中的 report entry 默认按 as-of 选择 artifact。显式标记 `artifact_selection_policy=latest_available` 的 ad-hoc research entry 只用于 Reader Brief/report index 的 latest 研究下钻，例如 Dynamic v3 parameter sweep leaderboard；这类记录会在 report index JSON/HTML 中披露 `artifact_temporal_relation=AFTER_AS_OF` 和 `artifact_after_as_of=true`，表示它是最新研究 evidence，不是 daily decision snapshot 的历史输入，也不允许补跑上游或生成 production action。

`config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `visibility_policy` 是 TRADING-487_to_504 Stage C 后 report index 的长期可见性分类：`current` 为默认当前证据，`legacy_optional` / `deprecated_optional` / `archived_optional` 用于历史或可选导航面；非 current 的 missing/stale artifact 会显示为 `LEGACY_*` / `DEPRECATED_*` 等审计状态并计入 `non_current_visibility_count`，不再制造当前 missing/stale warning。`config/report_index_visibility_waivers.yaml` 是 TRADING-352A/TRADING-375 report index visibility waiver source policy，当前保留治理入口但 `waivers: []`。未来若确需临时 waiver，该文件仍必须按 `waiver_id`、affected report registry entry / artifact family、`issue_status`、`report_id(s)`、owner、reason、accepted impact、validation coverage、exit condition、`created_at`、`expires_at`、`review_status` 和 `linked_task_id` 记录；expired 或 inactive waiver 不改变 artifact 的 `freshness_status`，不补造 report，不运行上游，也不能 waiver required daily missing 或 production-effect risk；`aits reports waiver-inventory` / `validate-waiver-inventory` 会 fail closed 暴露过期或缺 registry entry 的 waiver。

TRADING-421 exact blocker/warning inventory 是只读恢复治理 artifact，位于 `outputs/reports/exact_blocker_warning_inventory_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` 和 `exact_blocker_warning_inventory_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`。`aits reports exact-blocker-warning-inventory --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 recovery blocker triage、post-recovery governance pack、source depth audit、report-index warning triage、normal paper-shadow observation clock 和 recovery owner action map，逐条输出当前 post-recovery source counts 下的 blocker、recovery warning 和 report-index unwaived warning 的 source artifact、upstream dependency、repair type、waiver eligibility、next action、normal/extended/live boundary 与 Reader Brief section。该 report 不运行上游、不刷新数据、不补造 signal/snapshot/metrics、不创建 waiver、不写 owner decision、不修改 paper-shadow/production state、不触发 broker/order；存在 blocker 时只把 `EXACT_INVENTORY_BLOCKED` 暴露给 owner review。

TRADING-429～438 decision-stage review 是只读 owner-decision 前置治理 artifact family，位于 `outputs/reports/eight_blocker_decision_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`normal_shadow_gate_gap_analysis_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`promotion_blocker_after_metrics_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`candidate_research_return_assessment_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`owner_decision_options_packet_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`owner_decision_dry_run_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`observation_clock_readiness_plan_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`post_decision_rerun_plan_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`report_quality_warning_drilldown_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`governance_status_snapshot_after_decision_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` 和 `eight_blocker_decision_review_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`。`aits reports decision-stage-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 current report index、research governance recovery pack、report quality gate、owner audit log 和 recovery pack source artifacts；`owner_decision_dry_run` 只验证 proposed record shape，必须保持 `would_append=false` / `real_entry_written=false`。这些 artifacts 不 append owner decision、不生成 signoff、不启动 observation clock、不恢复 normal shadow、不批准 extended shadow/live trading、不写 official target weights、不修改 candidate/paper-shadow/production state、不触发 broker/order。

TRADING-439～448 return-to-research reset 是 decision-stage 后的 research reset artifact family。`aits reports return-to-research-reset --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 会记录显式 owner `return_to_research` decision（append-only JSONL；同 decision id 已存在时复用），并生成 `owner_return_to_research_decision_record`、`candidate_return_to_research_transition_pack`、`candidate_failure_mode_attribution`、`reusable_evidence_extraction`、`return_to_research_hypothesis_backlog`、`next_candidate_spec_draft`、`research_backfill_plan_for_next_candidate`、`archived_candidate_status_update`、`research_cycle_reset_pack`、`return_to_research_governance_snapshot` 和 `return_to_research_governance_snapshot_validation`。这些 artifacts 把 candidate 状态置为可审计的 `RETURNED_TO_RESEARCH`，但不 reject、不恢复 normal shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不修改 production 或 broker/order。

TRADING-449～459 next research cycle 是 return-to-research 之后的 research-only artifact family。`aits reports next-research-cycle-intake`、`next-candidate-spec-freeze`、`next-candidate-backfill`、`next-candidate-stress-review`、`next-candidate-cost-benchmark-review`、`next-candidate-vs-returned-candidate-comparison`、`next-candidate-signal-robustness-review`、`next-candidate-overfit-window-sensitivity`、`next-candidate-research-gate`、`next-candidate-owner-research-review-packet` 和 `next-candidate-research-cycle-snapshot` 依次生成 `next_research_cycle_intake`、`next_candidate_spec_frozen`、`next_candidate_backfill`、`next_candidate_stress_review`、`next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review`、`next_candidate_vs_returned_candidate_comparison`、`next_candidate_signal_robustness_review`、`next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity`、`next_candidate_research_gate`、`next_candidate_owner_research_review_packet` 和 `next_candidate_research_cycle_snapshot`；对应 `validate-next-*` 命令可生成 validation artifacts，其中 final snapshot validation 为 `next_candidate_research_cycle_snapshot_validation`。这些 artifacts 不创建 paper-shadow candidate、不恢复 normal shadow、不批准 extended/live、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production；TRADING-451 在解释 backfill 前运行同一 validate-data code path，并在缺 executable next-candidate signal/weight binding 时 fail closed 为 more-evidence 状态。

TRADING-460 executable binding contract 是 TRADING-449～459 之后的 contract-only research artifact。`aits reports next-candidate-executable-binding-contract --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 frozen spec、final next research-cycle snapshot、backfill plan 和 research gate output，生成 `next_candidate_executable_binding_contract`；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-executable-binding-contract --latest` 生成 `next_candidate_executable_binding_contract_validation`。该 contract 只定义 required signal/feature inputs、allowed research-only state outputs、allowed hypothetical allocation output schema 和 forbidden outputs，不实现 signal behavior、不产生 hypothetical weights、不创建 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不修改 production。

TRADING-461 executable signal binding 是 contract 后的 research-only signal state layer。`aits reports next-candidate-signal-binding --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一路径的 cached-data quality gate，然后读取 contract validation、frozen spec、signal input completeness policy、ETF signal series 和 feature matrix，生成 `next_candidate_signal_binding`；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-signal-binding --latest` 生成 validation。该 layer 只输出 candidate signal series、latest signal state、confidence/uncertainty 和 blocking reason；不输出 hypothetical research weights、official target weights、paper-shadow activation、broker/order、owner decision 或 backfill metrics。

TRADING-462 executable research weight binding 是 signal binding 后的 hypothetical-only allocation layer。`aits reports next-candidate-research-weight-binding --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一路径的 cached-data quality gate，然后读取 `next_candidate_signal_binding` 和 validation，按 governed research weight policy 输出 `next_candidate_research_weight_binding`；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-research-weight-binding --latest` 生成 validation。该 layer 只输出 hypothetical research weights、previous hypothetical weights、rotation delta、turnover proxy、risk state、constraint hits 和 blocking reason；不输出 official target weights、paper-shadow activation、broker/order、owner decision、production mutation 或 backfill return/drawdown/cost/benchmark metrics。

TRADING-463 executable binding safety audit 是 TRADING-464 backfill 前的 hard-stop safety gate。`aits reports executable-binding-safety-audit --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 读取 signal binding、research weight binding 及其 validation artifacts，并扫描 binding module、research policy 和生成 artifacts 是否出现 official target weights、broker/order、live allocation、production mutation、account/API key、paper-shadow activation 或 owner decision append 语义；`aits reports validate-executable-binding-safety-audit --latest` 生成 validation。只有 `EXECUTABLE_BINDING_SAFETY_PASS` 或 acceptable `EXECUTABLE_BINDING_SAFETY_WARNING` 才允许继续 rerun backfill；`EXECUTABLE_BINDING_SAFETY_BLOCKED` 必须停止。

TRADING-464 binding-backed next candidate backfill 在 safety audit pass/acceptable warning 后运行。`aits reports next-candidate-backfill --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 先运行同一路径的 validate-data quality gate，然后读取 executable signal binding、research-only weight binding、safety audit、frozen spec、backfill windows 和价格 cache，输出真实 return/drawdown/turnover/rotation/false-risk-off/constraint/signal-completeness proxy metrics；`aits reports validate-next-candidate-backfill --latest` 生成 validation。当前 binding 只有单点 signal/weight row 时，artifact 必须标为 `CANDIDATE_BACKFILL_PARTIAL` 和 static research-weight proxy，不得声明完整动态策略 backfill。

TRADING-465 stress/cost/benchmark rerun 使用 TRADING-464 的 complete 或 partial real metrics 重新生成 `next_candidate_stress_review`、`next_candidate_stress_review_validation`、`next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review` 和 `next_candidate_cost_benchmark_review_validation`。`aits reports next-candidate-stress-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 从 backfill window metrics 输出 stress result、major blockers/warnings、worst return/drawdown proxy 和 scenario rows；`aits reports next-candidate-cost-benchmark-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` 用 aggregate return proxy 和 turnover proxy 计算 cost drag、net proxy、cost survival 和 candidate-vs-baseline delta。2026-06-17 真实 run 基于 `CANDIDATE_BACKFILL_PARTIAL` static proxy，stress 为 `WEAK`，cost/benchmark 为 `COST_BENCHMARK_REVIEW_WEAK`，validation 均 PASS；这些 artifacts 只支持继续 research comparison，不优化候选、不创建 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-466 vs-returned comparison 使用 returned candidate failure attribution、reusable/invalidated evidence、TRADING-464 real backfill、TRADING-465 stress review 和 TRADING-465 cost/benchmark review 生成 `next_candidate_vs_returned_candidate_comparison` 与 validation artifact。Comparison rows 覆盖 drawdown mismatch、flip/rotation、turnover、cost survival、benchmark-relative behavior、signal robustness 和 governance blockers，并明确标记 repeated failure mode。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `MIXED_VS_RETURNED_CANDIDATE`，benchmark relative behavior 为 `REPEATS_FAILURE_MODE`，drawdown mismatch 为 `REGRESSED_VS_REUSABLE_EVIDENCE`，validation PASS；该 artifact 不声明 improved、不进入 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-467 signal/window rerun 使用 executable signal binding 和 TRADING-464 real backfill window metrics 生成 `next_candidate_signal_robustness_review`、`next_candidate_signal_robustness_review_validation`、`next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity` 和 `next_candidate_overfit_window_sensitivity_validation` artifacts。Signal review 对 missing feature columns、partial signal series、stale signal series、schema mismatch 和 market coverage gap fail closed；window review 对 early/middle/recent/stress-heavy/calm diagnostic splits 输出 real split metrics、fragility、overfit risk 和 blocking conditions。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `SIGNAL_ROBUSTNESS_BLOCKED`（blocking checks=3）与 `WINDOW_FRAGILE`（`overfit_risk=HIGH`、weak splits=2、partial static proxy splits=3），validations PASS；该 artifact 不推进 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。

TRADING-468 research gate rerun 使用 executable binding safety audit、TRADING-464 real backfill、TRADING-465 stress/cost/benchmark reviews、TRADING-466 vs-returned comparison 和 TRADING-467 signal/window reviews 生成 `next_candidate_research_gate` 与 validation artifact。Gate taxonomy 限定为 `RESEARCH_PROMISING|NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE|RETURN_TO_HYPOTHESIS_BACKLOG|REJECT_RESEARCH_CANDIDATE`，并必须披露 strongest positive/negative evidence、blockers 和 required next action。2026-06-17 真实 run 输出 `NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE`，blockers=5，validation PASS；该 gate 不激活 paper-shadow、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order、不 append owner decision、不修改 production。
