| `reports/data_governance/pit_source_manifest/<manifest_id>/pit_source_manifest.json`<br/>`pit_source_manifest.md`、`pit_source_manifest_validation.json/md`、`reader_brief_section.md` | `aits data-sources pit-manifest report` / `aits data-sources pit-manifest validate --latest` | `config/data_sources.yaml`、`data/raw/download_manifest.csv`、source catalog cache paths | `report_type=pit_source_manifest`、policy metadata、safety boundary、source records、retrieval_time、effective_date、revision_risk、`STRONG_PIT|APPROX_PIT|NON_PIT|UNKNOWN`、cache path、checksum、refresh policy、validation policy、grade counts、non-strong source ids、validation issues | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `pit_source_manifest`、Reader Brief `PIT Source Manifest` 区块、monthly/manual data governance review | 否，`production_effect=none` | Source-level governance manifest 不刷新数据、不运行评分或回测、不修复全部 PIT 问题；`APPROX_PIT`、`NON_PIT`、`UNKNOWN` 不能被解释为 production-grade PIT 证据；warning 是治理调查项，不是静默豁免 |
| `artifacts/data_refresh_audit/validation/validate_data_*.json`<br/>`reports/data_governance/data_refresh_audit/<audit_id>/data_refresh_audit.json`<br/>`data_refresh_audit.md`、`data_refresh_audit_validation.json/md`、`reader_brief_section.md` | `aits validate-data` 写 validation sidecar；`aits data refresh-audit report --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits data refresh-audit validate --latest` | raw market/macro cache、`outputs/reports/data_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.md`、latest `artifacts/data_refresh/YYYY-MM-DD/market_data_refresh_summary.json`、price cache checksum/row count、U.S. market calendar | `report_type=data_refresh_audit`、audit records、data type、source、start/end time、as_of、status、checksum、record count、warning/error count、market session skip reason、summary failed/skipped/warning/error counts、next action、validation issues、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `data_refresh_audit`、Reader Brief `Data Refresh Audit` 区块、paper-shadow freshness/readiness 人工复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | Audit trail 只读记录 refresh/validation 证据；缺 validation sidecar 必须 fail closed；`SKIPPED_MARKET_CLOSED` / `SKIPPED_NO_NEW_DATA` 不是 fresh data 证明；报告不刷新数据、不补造 cache、不降低 `aits validate-data` 门禁、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order |
| `reports/data_governance/data_source_fallback_policy/<report_id>/data_source_fallback_policy.json`<br/>`data_source_fallback_policy.md`、`data_source_fallback_policy_validation.json/md`、`reader_brief_section.md` | `aits data fallback-policy run --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`、`aits data fallback-policy report --latest`、`aits data fallback-policy validate --latest` | `config/data_source_fallback_policy.yaml`、`config/data_sources.yaml`、显式 `--unavailable-source-id` / `--fallback-used-source-id` / `--fallback-reason` declarations | `report_type=data_source_fallback_policy`、source groups、source priority、source eligibility、fallback states `PRIMARY_OK|FALLBACK_USED|FALLBACK_UNAVAILABLE|BLOCKED_NO_VALID_SOURCE`、fallback metadata、blocking data types、Reader Brief section、validation issues、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `data_source_fallback_policy`、Reader Brief `Data Source Fallback Policy` 区块、data refresh audit、PIT source manifest、evidence staleness monitor、shadow continuation readiness | 否，`production_effect=none` | Fallback policy 只定义和披露 source fallback 状态；`FALLBACK_USED` 不是 silent replacement，也不是 production approval；`FALLBACK_UNAVAILABLE` / `BLOCKED_NO_VALID_SOURCE` 必须 fail closed；报告不下载数据、不写 cache、不运行评分/回测、不触发 broker/order |
| `reports/data_governance/cache_catalog/<catalog_id>/cache_catalog.json`<br/>`cache_catalog.md`、`cache_catalog_validation.json/md`、`reader_brief_section.md` | `aits data cache-catalog run --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`、`aits data cache-catalog report --latest`、`aits data cache-catalog validate --latest` | `config/cache_catalog.yaml`、`config/data_sources.yaml`、price / secondary price / macro / market panel cache、latest validation sidecar、latest data refresh audit、可选 explicit expected checksum 或 previous catalog | `report_type=cache_catalog`、policy metadata、safety boundary、cache entry records、artifact id、data type、cache path、as_of、checksum、row/column count、created/modified timestamp、source ids/names、validation timestamp、refresh audit id、missing required entries、checksum mismatch entries、validation issues、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `cache_catalog`、Reader Brief `Cache Catalog` 区块、data refresh audit、PIT source manifest、evidence staleness monitor、shadow continuation readiness | 否，`production_effect=none` | Cache catalog 只读扫描既有 cache，不刷新、不修复、不补造缺失 cache；missing required、unreadable cache 或 checksum mismatch 必须 fail closed；latest pointer 不是数据输入；缺 artifact 时下游 summary 显示 `MISSING`，不得补造 cache integrity 结论 |
| `outputs/reports/data_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits validate-data` | raw market/macro cache、download manifest、data quality config | data quality status、schema、freshness、duplicates、suspicious values、reconciliation | features、score-daily、backtest 前置门禁 | 是，失败时下游应停止 | PASS 不等于投资结论可靠，只代表数据缓存可继续用 |
| `outputs/reports/data_quality_YYYY-MM-DD_marketstack_reconciliation.csv` | `aits validate-data` | FMP 主源、Marketstack 第二源 | ticker/date、主/二源数值、分类、severity、证据 | 数据质量复核 | 是，作为质量证据 | INFO 不代表改价，只是可解释差异 |
| `artifacts/signal_snapshots/YYYY-MM-DD/signal_snapshot.json/md` | `aits signals build-snapshot --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` | shadow backtest config、production baseline asset universe、cached prices | `metadata`、required signal status/quality/method/coverage、signal values、overall_quality、real/proxy/neutral fallback signal lists、`can_run_full_signal_backtest`、`can_promote_candidate`、`production_effect=none` | backtest input diagnostics、shadow backtest score calculation、daily task dashboard、Reader Brief、人工 signal quality 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | v0.1 允许 proxy/neutral fallback 以跑通 full-signal-limited 链路；fallback 必须明示为 `LIMITED` 或 `NEUTRAL_FALLBACK`，不能被误读为 full signal quality OK，也不允许 LLM 直接生成信号数值 |
| `artifacts/signal_ablation/YYYY-MM-DD/signal_ablation_summary.json/md` | `aits signals ablation --latest --debug` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD`；诊断解释由 `aits signals explain-ablation --latest` 读取；alias 由 `aits reports signal-ablation --latest` 读取 | `config/parameters/signal_ablation.yaml`、shadow backtest config、production baseline 参数、通过同一路门禁的 market/macro cache、同日 backtest input diagnostics、同日 signal snapshot | `metadata.status`、`backtest_mode`、baseline metrics、per-signal `remove_one_signal_delta`、walk-forward stability、`contribution_class`、`diagnostic_status`、`classification_reason`、`signal_usage_diagnostics`、`score_impact`、`portfolio_impact`、`threshold_diagnostics`、proxy/fallback warnings、`promotion_credit_allowed`、summary lists、`no_promotion_credit_reason`、safety fields | Dashboard `Signal Ablation Summary` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` 摘要、shadow promotion decision supporting artifact、人工 signal quality 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 正贡献不等于允许 candidate promotion；`NO_SCORE_IMPACT` / `NO_PORTFOLIO_IMPACT` / `BELOW_THRESHOLD` 是诊断状态，不是自动修复或自动调权；proxy/fallback 即使看似有贡献也不得作为 promotion 正面证据；报告不调权、不修改 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、不触发交易 |
| `artifacts/signal_calibration/YYYY-MM-DD/signal_calibration_summary.json/md` + `recommended_signal_profile.yaml` + `profiles/*/signal_snapshot.json/md` | `aits signals calibrate --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD`；alias 由 `aits reports signal-calibration --latest` 读取 | `config/signals/signal_calibration_profiles.yaml`、`config/parameters/signal_ablation.yaml`、shadow backtest config、production baseline 参数、通过同一路门禁的 market/macro cache、price-derived calibrated signal snapshots | `metadata.status`、`backtest_mode=full_signal_backtest_limited`、profile metrics、per-profile ablation contribution、signal distribution diagnostics、neutral compression warning、trend/sector correlation warning、ranking metrics、best profile、recommended profile artifact、promotion impact、safety fields | Dashboard `Signal Calibration Summary` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` calibration 摘要、shadow promotion decision supporting artifact、人工 signal profile 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | best profile 不是 production profile；recommended YAML 只供人工复核，不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`；calibration 不解除 fallback/proxy 限制、不自动 candidate promotion；如果 score/portfolio 有变化但贡献仍低于阈值，应进入 portfolio sensitivity diagnostics |
| `artifacts/portfolio_sensitivity/YYYY-MM-DD/portfolio_sensitivity_summary.json/md` + `recommended_portfolio_sensitivity_profile.yaml` | `aits portfolio sensitivity --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD`；alias 由 `aits reports portfolio-sensitivity --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits portfolio validate-sensitivity --latest` 读取 | `config/portfolio/portfolio_sensitivity_profiles.yaml`、shadow backtest config、production baseline 参数、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、通过同一路门禁的 market/macro cache、同日或最近 signal snapshot、可选 latest signal calibration summary | `metadata.status`、`backtest_mode=full_signal_backtest_limited`、`data_gate`（manifest、latest resolution、registry consistency、error_code）、per-profile score dispersion、score-to-target-weight、target-to-actual-weight、rebalance suppression、constraint binding、turnover/cost、performance、ranking metrics、best profile、primary bottleneck、recommended profile artifact、promotion impact、safety fields | Dashboard `Portfolio Sensitivity Summary` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` sensitivity 摘要、shadow promotion decision supporting artifact、人工 portfolio construction 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | best profile 不是 production 参数；recommended YAML 只供人工复核，不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`；sensitivity 先用 manifest context 调用 data quality gate，不绕过 `validate-data`；sensitivity 只能诊断 score-to-weight 传导，不解除 signal quality `LIMITED`、fallback/proxy 限制或 candidate promotion 禁令 |
| `artifacts/portfolio_candidates/YYYY-MM-DD/portfolio_candidates_summary.json/md` + `recommended_portfolio_candidate.yaml` | `aits portfolio candidates --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--profile ...` / `--profiles ...` / `--dry-run`；alias 由 `aits reports portfolio-candidates --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits portfolio validate-candidates --latest` 读取 | `config/portfolio/portfolio_candidate_profiles.yaml`、shadow backtest config、signal ablation config、production baseline 参数、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、通过同一路门禁的 market/macro cache、同日或最近 signal snapshot、latest portfolio sensitivity summary、可选 latest signal calibration / shadow backtest summary | `metadata.status`、`backtest_mode=full_signal_backtest_limited`、`data_gate`、baseline construction、per-candidate `signal_transmission`、`delta_vs_baseline`、performance/risk/turnover/cost、risk guardrails、remove-one-signal contribution summary、ranking score、hard rejection reasons、recommended candidate artifact、promotion impact、safety fields | Dashboard `Portfolio Candidate Profiles` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` candidates 摘要、shadow promotion decision supporting artifact、人工 portfolio construction review workflow 输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | recommended candidate 不是 production 参数；不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`；Dashboard/Reader Brief 读取 candidates 时只能选择不晚于 report `as_of` 的最大 artifact 日期，不能按 mtime 误选旧 artifact；候选评估必须先通过同一路 data quality gate 并读取 portfolio sensitivity blocker；即使 transmission 改善，也不得解除 signal quality `LIMITED`、manual review 或 candidate promotion 禁令 |
| `artifacts/portfolio_candidate_reviews/YYYY-MM-DD/portfolio_candidate_review_package.json/md` + `portfolio_candidate_review_decision.json/md` | `aits portfolio review-candidate --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--candidate ...` 生成 package 和 pending decision；`aits portfolio decide-candidate --latest --decision ...` 写人工 decision；alias 由 `aits reports portfolio-candidate-review --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits portfolio validate-review --latest` 读取 | `config/portfolio/portfolio_candidate_review.yaml`、latest `recommended_portfolio_candidate.yaml`、portfolio candidates summary、portfolio sensitivity、signal calibration、signal ablation、signal snapshot、backtest manifest、price cache reconcile、shadow backtest summary、当前 production 参数文件 hash | review package `metadata.status=PENDING_REVIEW`、candidate profile/hash/version、current production SHA256/modified、evidence summary、risk summary、manual review checklist、missing supporting artifacts、rollback reference；decision `status`（pending/watch/rejected/needs_more_data/approved_for_shadow_candidate）、reviewer、reason、allowed next step、hard rejections、safety fields | Dashboard `Portfolio Candidate Review` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` review 摘要、shadow promotion decision supporting artifact、后续 shadow candidate tracking workflow 输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | `approved_for_shadow_candidate` 只代表 shadow tracking，不是 production approval；review decision 不覆盖 backtest 结果、不解除 signal quality `LIMITED`、不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、不自动 promotion；缺 supporting artifacts 必须明示，不能补造内容 |
| `artifacts/portfolio_candidate_tracking/YYYY-MM-DD/portfolio_candidate_tracking_summary.json/md` + `state/active_shadow_candidates.json` | `aits portfolio track-candidate --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--review ...` / `--dry-run`；alias 由 `aits reports portfolio-candidate-tracking --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits portfolio validate-tracking --latest` 读取 | `config/portfolio/portfolio_candidate_tracking.yaml`、latest eligible `portfolio_candidate_review_decision.json`、review package、recommended portfolio candidate、portfolio candidates summary、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、price cache registry、signal snapshot、shadow backtest summary、当前 production 参数 hash | `metadata.status`、candidate profile/hash、review status/date、`tracking_status`、`date_resolution`（tracking/effective/review/candidate/manifest/market dates、roll-forward reason）、`data_gate`、daily tracking baseline vs candidate metrics、risk guardrails、promotion impact、active state、safety fields | Dashboard `Portfolio Candidate Tracking` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` tracking 摘要、shadow promotion decision supporting artifact、后续人工 performance review | 否，`production_effect=none` | Shadow tracking 是连续观察层，不是 production approval；`degraded_tracking` 表示 latest run date 与 effective data date 不一致但仍保留审计比较，`tracking_blocked` 不得被 workaround 绕过；tracking 表现好也不自动 promotion、不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml` |
| `artifacts/portfolio_tracking_reviews/YYYY-MM-DD/portfolio_tracking_review_summary.json/md` | `aits portfolio review-tracking --latest --show-window-progress` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--candidate <profile>` / `--window 5d|20d|since-start` / `--dry-run`；窗口状态由 `aits portfolio tracking-window-status --latest` 读取；alias 由 `aits reports portfolio-tracking-review --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits portfolio validate-tracking-review --latest` 读取 | `config/portfolio/portfolio_tracking_review.yaml`、`config/portfolio/portfolio_tracking_review_windows.yaml`、`artifacts/portfolio_candidate_tracking/state/active_shadow_candidates.json`、daily tracking summaries、latest review/candidate/freshness/refresh/manifest supporting artifacts、当前 production 参数 hash | `metadata.status`、candidate profile、tracking status/start/days、data readiness、`tracking_window`（tracking_days、stage、min_days_for_short_review、min_days_for_extended_review、days_until_short_review、days_until_extended_review、can_form_short_window_conclusion、can_form_extended_review_conclusion、done_condition_met）、baseline vs candidate performance、relative performance、signal transmission review、risk guardrails、recommendation、promotion impact、anti-backfill/anti-synthetic safety fields | Dashboard `Portfolio Tracking Review` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` review 摘要、shadow backtest promotion decision supporting artifact 和最小窗口不足 reason、人工 short-window / extended review 输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | Recommendation 是 advisory-only：`eligible_for_extended_review` 也不是 production approval；1-4 个真实 tracking days 必须输出 `needs_more_data`，5 天后才允许 short-window 判断，20 天后才允许 extended-review readiness；freshness/data gate/tracking 非 active 必须 block/pause；不得伪造或回填 tracking days，不得因单日表现好修改 production 参数或解除 signal quality 限制 |
| `artifacts/weight_tuning/YYYY-MM-DD/weight_tuning_summary.json/md` + `recommended_shadow_weights.yaml` + `weight_tuning_candidates.json` | `aits parameters tune-weights --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--config ...` / `--portfolio-profile lower_rebalance_threshold_2pct` / `--signals ...` / `--dry-run`；alias 由 `aits reports weight-tuning --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits parameters validate-weight-tuning --latest` 读取；解释由 `aits parameters explain-weight-tuning --latest` 读取 | `config/parameters/weight_tuning_v0_1.yaml`、production baseline 参数、shadow backtest config、portfolio candidate profiles、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、market data freshness summary、latest signal snapshot、通过同一路 `validate-data` 门禁的 market/macro cache | `metadata.status`、`signal_quality`、restricted tuning scope、baseline weights/metrics、search counts、candidate ranking、recommended candidate status/weights/metrics/relative metrics/objective breakdown/guardrails、walk-forward windows、promotion impact、safety fields；candidates JSON 保留全部受限 grid candidate 审计明细 | Dashboard `Weight Tuning Summary` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` weight tuning 摘要、shadow backtest promotion decision supporting artifact、人工 shadow weight candidate 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 受限调参只生成 advisory shadow weights；不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`，不自动 promotion，不解除 signal quality `LIMITED`，不让 `earnings_quality` / `event_risk` 自由调参，`valuation_risk` 只能 capped tuning；`NO_CANDIDATE` 表示 baseline 仍是参考配置，不是 production 参数优化结论 |
| `artifacts/weight_tuning_failure/YYYY-MM-DD/weight_tuning_failure_summary.json/md` + `weight_tuning_failure_candidates_debug.json` | `aits parameters explain-weight-tuning-failure --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--summary ...` / `--debug`；alias 由 `aits reports weight-tuning-failure --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits parameters validate-weight-tuning-failure --latest` 读取 | latest 或指定 `weight_tuning_summary.json`、同目录或 summary 引用的 `weight_tuning_candidates.json`、signal snapshot 摘要、portfolio candidates/tracking、market data freshness、backtest input manifest、production 参数路径 | `metadata.status`、tuning result、candidate rejection summary、data/signal/search/performance/walk-forward/guardrail failure breakdown、failure ranking、near-miss candidates、root cause、recommended next action、promotion impact、diagnostic quality、safety fields | Dashboard `Weight Tuning Failure Attribution` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` failure root cause 摘要、shadow backtest promotion decision supporting artifact、TRADING-060 后续任务选择 | 否，`production_effect=none` | failure attribution 只解释 `NO_CANDIDATE`，不重新调参、不降低 guardrail、不放开 fallback signal、不生成伪 candidate、不修改 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`；`BLOCKED` 表示缺少 tuning summary 或 candidates artifact，需要先恢复输入审计链 |
| `artifacts/weight_stability/YYYY-MM-DD/weight_stability_summary.json/md` + `stable_weight_candidates.json` + 可选 `recommended_stable_shadow_weights.yaml` | `aits parameters tune-weights-stable --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--config ...` / `--portfolio-profile ...` / `--signals ...` / `--dry-run`；alias 由 `aits reports weight-stability --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits parameters validate-weight-stability --latest` 读取；解释由 `aits parameters explain-weight-stability --latest` 读取 | `config/parameters/weight_tuning_v0_2_stability.yaml`、production baseline 参数、shadow backtest config、portfolio candidate profiles、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、market data freshness summary、latest signal snapshot、TRADING-060 turnover attribution context、通过同一路 `validate-data` 门禁的 market/macro cache | `metadata.status`、input_context previous turnover root cause、stability constraints、turnover controls、search summary、candidate diagnostics、recommended candidate、comparison to TRADING-059、promotion impact、safety fields；candidates JSON 保留 stability / turnover prefilter 诊断 | Dashboard `Weight Search Stability` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` stability 摘要、shadow backtest promotion decision supporting artifact、人工判断 TRADING-061 是否降低 turnover/cost failures 或是否说明 signal quality 不足 | 否，`production_effect=none` | stable tuning 只收敛 shadow-only weight search，不降低 turnover guardrail、不修改 cost model、不放开 fallback signals、不写 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、不自动 promotion；如输出 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`，只能说明上游 readiness 不足，不得解释为稳定候选失败 |
| `artifacts/weight_stability_readiness/YYYY-MM-DD/weight_stability_readiness_summary.json/md` | `aits parameters diagnose-weight-stability-inputs --latest` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--config ...` / `--dry-run`；恢复计划由 `aits parameters recover-weight-stability-inputs --latest --dry-run` 生成；alias 由 `aits reports weight-stability-readiness --latest` 读取；校验由 `aits parameters validate-weight-stability-readiness --latest` 读取 | latest 或指定日期的 market data freshness summary、market data refresh summary、signal snapshot、backtest input diagnostics / manifest、previous weight stability artifact、`config/parameters/weight_tuning_v0_2_stability.yaml` | `metadata.status`、previous stable tuning context、freshness readiness、recover-freshness result、signal snapshot readiness、backtest manifest readiness、price coverage readiness、stable tuning eligibility、blocking errors、recovery plan、promotion impact、safety fields | Dashboard `Stable Weight Tuning Readiness` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review` readiness 摘要、`tune-weights-stable` 输入阻塞解释、shadow backtest promotion decision supporting artifact、人工决定是否进入 TRADING-061B 数据恢复 | 否，`production_effect=none` | readiness 只读诊断 stable tuning 输入前置条件，不自动改 cache、不降低 data quality gate、不生成 synthetic price history、不绕过 manifest / price coverage；`recover-weight-stability-inputs` 第一版只输出计划，需人工或后续任务执行恢复 |

| `outputs/reports/daily_score_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits score-daily` | scores、quality、features、manual inputs、trace context | Decision Card status、Data Lineage、funnel、gate ladder、module scores、review sections | 人读主报告、dashboard 输入 | Advisory / trend judgment | 报告仓位是解释区间，不是自动买卖 |
| `data/processed/decision_snapshots/decision_snapshot_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | `aits score-daily` | 当日评分上下文、gate、quality、trace | market regime、scores、confidence、positions、position_gates、trace refs | feedback、shadow、replay、dashboard | 是，记录 production 判断 | 不是回测结果，且不应被后验 outcome 改写 |
| `outputs/reports/calculation_explainers_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | `aits score-daily` / `aits reports calculation-explainers` | `data/processed/decision_snapshots/decision_snapshot_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`config/metric_explainers.yaml`、可选 `data/processed/scores_daily.csv` | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=calculation_explainers`、`production_effect=none`、metric formula、input fields / values、source artifacts、PIT policy、limitations、overall/component/effective weight/confidence/gate/final position explainers；RankIC / max drawdown / baseline coverage 在非回测上下文为 `DEFINITION_ONLY` | Reader Brief 和后续 HTML 解释层的只读输入；当前也可人工审计“这个数字怎么算” | 否，`production_effect=none` | 它不重新计算 score、不修改 weights/gates，也不替代 decision snapshot；缺少 optional scores cache 只进入 warning |
| `outputs/reports/daily_indicator_weight_trace_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits score-daily` | 已生成的 `DailyScoreReport`、`scores_daily.csv` 输出路径、decision snapshot 输出路径、`config/research/indicator_research_registry.yaml` | `report_type=daily_indicator_weight_trace`、`trace_contract_id=multi_stage_weight_trace_contract_v1`、component/gate trace rows、raw indicator values、normalized indicator score、mapped signal contribution、pre/post constraint signal weight、final advisory/portfolio-facing weight、per-gate before/after/delta、valuation/crowding -> trend masking fields、trace contract field audit、`production_effect=none` | `aits research indicators masking|coverage-gap|masking-casebook|ablation-validation|masking-effectiveness-review|masking-robustness-review|validation-rollup|outcome-availability-audit|historical-trace-validation|gate-availability-audit|component-historical-trace|backtest-trace-bridge|lineage-manifest-repair|validation-pack --trace-path ...` 的只读输入；用于 VALIDATING 阶段确认 dominance/masking 不再只有 `TRACE_DATA_REQUIRED`，并可合并 PIT sliced historical `score-daily` replay 形成多日期 historical validation 输入；outcome availability/effectiveness review 按 horizon-specific maturity 和 scenario × horizon conclusion matrix 使用 realized price evaluation；robustness review 只读输出 scenario delta matrix、date/asset/cluster aggregation、case diagnostics、support attribution、conservative evidence gate 和 pending 20d tracker；validation rollup 只汇总 readiness/status/tracker/rerun criteria，不把短 horizon 证据或 validation recommendation 回写到 trace 或 production scoring | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只记录既有日报权重链路，不反向参与评分、不改变 production weight logic、不写 official/paper-shadow/live/broker/order 权重；historical/component/bridge/lineage repair/robustness review/rollup trace 仍是 validation artifact，不批准参数修改或 official/paper-shadow 权重 |

| `outputs/data_quality/data_source_qualification/data_source_qualification_matrix.json/md`<br/>`outputs/data_quality/data_source_qualification/data_foundation_remediation_plan.json/md`<br/>`outputs/data_quality/data_source_qualification/data_foundation_acceptance_summary_updated.json/md` | `aits data source-qualification remediate` | TRADING-734 `data_foundation_acceptance_report.json`、module-level component status、feature family risk classification、asset/source qualification summary、P0 data-source remediation priorities | `report_type=data_source_qualification_matrix` / `data_foundation_remediation_plan` / `data_foundation_acceptance_summary_updated`、9 个 module-level qualification rows、`PROMOTION_GRADE_READY|DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY|BLOCKED_UNTIL_QUALIFIED|RESEARCH_LABEL_ONLY|CURRENT_VIEW_ONLY|UNKNOWN_REQUIRES_MANUAL_REVIEW` matrix、逐项 blocked/diagnostic/current-view remediation rows、`missing_contract`、`missing_source_manifest`、`missing_available_time`、`current_view_only_risk`、`lineage_gap`、`PIT_risk`、`repairable_without_relaxing_gate`、`required_fix`、`expected_promotion_grade_gain_if_fixed`、`lookahead_violation_count=0`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_change_allowed=false`、`production_weight_change_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`、`production_effect=none` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 中 `data_source_qualification_remediation` entry、TRADING-735 owner remediation planning、source qualification work queue、large-scale research preflight | 否，`production_effect=none` | Matrix 中的 module-level `PROMOTION_GRADE_READY` 只表示该模块合同/运行层可复现，不表示其输入数据源已经 promotion-grade；`DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY`、`CURRENT_VIEW_ONLY`、`RESEARCH_LABEL_ONLY` 和 `BLOCKED_UNTIL_QUALIFIED` 不能用于 paper-shadow、official weights、production 或 broker/order，修复也不得通过放宽 PIT/data-quality/lineage gate 完成。 |
| `outputs/data_quality/data_source_remediation_execution/data_source_remediation_execution_report.json/md`<br/>`outputs/data_quality/data_source_remediation_execution/data_source_remediation_item_results.json/md`<br/>`outputs/data_quality/data_source_remediation_execution/data_source_qualification_matrix_updated.json/md` | `aits data source-qualification execute-remediation` | TRADING-734 acceptance report、TRADING-735 qualification matrix、remediation plan、updated acceptance summary、重新运行的 `aits data foundation-acceptance run` 输出 | `report_type=data_source_remediation_execution_report`、per-item `before_status` / `after_status` / `blocked_reason` / `fix_applied` / `remaining_gap` / `repairable_without_relaxing_gate` / `promotion_grade_candidate_after_fix` / `allowed_uses`、current-view isolation、research-label-only usage policy、updated matrix `matrix_status`、`promotion_grade_ready_count`、`diagnostic_only_count`、`blocked_until_qualified_count`、`current_view_only_count`、`research_label_only_count`、`P0_remaining_count`、`P0_resolved_count`、`lookahead_violation_count=0`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false`、`paper_shadow_change_allowed=false`、`production_weight_change_allowed=false`、`broker_action=none`、`production_effect=none` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 中 `data_source_remediation_execution` entry、TRADING-736 owner remediation review、P0 source work queue、large-scale research preflight | 否，`production_effect=none` | `fix_applied` 只记录最小 usage boundary / isolation / required source proof，不代表 source 已 qualified；`current_view_only` 不允许作为 strategy input 或 promotion evidence；research-label-only 只能用于 analysis、casebook、stratified_reporting；`P0_remaining_count>0` 时不得用于 paper-shadow、official weights、production 或 broker/order。 |
| `outputs/data_quality/data_source_requirements/data_source_requirement_matrix.json/md` | `aits data source-qualification requirements` | TRADING-736 remediation execution report、item results、updated qualification matrix | `report_type=data_source_requirement_matrix`、P0 remaining source-level requirements、`missing_proof`、`required_raw_source`、`required_timestamp_fields`、`required_source_manifest`、`required_as_of_snapshot`、`required_corporate_action_revision_policy`、`can_fix_with_existing_data`、`requires_new_data_source`、`can_remain_diagnostic_only`、`promotion_grade_blocker`、分类 `SOURCE_MANIFEST_REQUIRED|AVAILABLE_TIME_REQUIRED|AS_OF_SNAPSHOT_REQUIRED|CORPORATE_ACTION_POLICY_REQUIRED|VENDOR_CURRENT_VIEW_ONLY|RESEARCH_LABEL_ONLY_BY_DESIGN|TRUE_PIT_LIMITATION|MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED`、`status_upgrade_attempted=false`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false`、`production_effect=none` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 中 `data_source_requirement_matrix` entry、TRADING-737 owner source procurement / qualification checklist、P0 source work queue | 否，`production_effect=none` | Requirement matrix 只说明缺什么 source proof，不尝试升级数据源状态；`can_remain_diagnostic_only=true` 不表示可作为 strategy input 或 promotion evidence；任何缺 as-of snapshot、available_time、manifest、revision/corporate-action policy 的 source 继续不能用于 paper-shadow、official weights、production 或 broker/order。 |
| `outputs/data_quality/current_subscription_data_coverage/current_subscription_data_coverage_matrix.json/md` | `aits data source-qualification subscription-audit` | 本地环境变量中已配置的 provider key 是否存在、FMP / Marketstack / EODHD / Alpha Vantage / FRED / Cboe / SEC / GovInfo / Congress endpoint entitlement probes、TRADING-737 source requirement matrix | `report_type=current_subscription_data_coverage_matrix`、provider key presence（不含 key 原文）、provider × endpoint coverage、representative universe coverage、historical depth observed、price/corporate-action/fundamental/event/available-time/source-manifest flags、current-view risk、PIT qualification gap、likely_allowed_use、TRADING-737 requirement subscription match、`api_key_material_recorded=false`、`status_upgrade_attempted=false`、`promotion_gate_allowed=false`、`production_effect=none` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 中 `current_subscription_data_coverage_matrix` entry、TRADING-738 owner subscription review、P0 source procurement / qualification checklist | 否，`production_effect=none` | Subscription coverage 只说明当前 key / entitlement / endpoint 覆盖和 remaining gap；不能输出或落盘 API key；endpoint accessible 不等于 source qualified，也不允许自动进入 strategy input、promotion evidence、paper-shadow、official weights、production 或 broker/order。 |
| `outputs/reports/evidence/daily_score_YYYY-MM-DD_trace.json` | `aits score-daily` | report claims、evidence、datasets、quality、run manifest | claim/evidence/dataset/quality refs、run id、rule versions、weight calibration | dashboard、trace lookup、审计 | 不直接改变结果 | 不是日报正文，而是证据索引 |
| `data/processed/prediction_ledger.csv` | `score-daily` / challenger shadow | decision snapshot、trace | candidate_id、production_effect、signal date、score、final position、outcome status | outcome calibration、shadow maturity | production 行影响正式观察；challenger 行必须隔离解释 | 后验 outcome 不应改写 signal-time 输入 |
| `outputs/reports/evidence_dashboard_YYYY-MM-DD.html` | `aits reports dashboard` | daily report、trace、snapshot、belief state、alerts、scores | dashboard status、分层展示结论、evidence、dataset、quality、gate、trend | 本地只读下钻 | 否，`production_effect=none` | dashboard 不替代 Markdown 日报和 trace 的审计责任 |

## Daily-run / replay 运行产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `outputs/reports/daily_ops_plan_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits ops daily-plan` / `daily-run` | market calendar、env presence、config | planned commands、required env、expected artifacts、skip reason | 调度前检查、daily-run | 否，只读计划 | 计划报告不代表命令已经执行 |
| `outputs/reports/daily_ops_run_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits ops daily-run` | plan、实际子命令结果 | step status、exit code、duration、artifact paths、失败诊断路径 | 运行审计、问题定位 | 是，作为生产运行审计 | 主报告不保存 stdout/stderr 原文或 secret；失败输出只在独立脱敏诊断 artifact 中保留 |
| `outputs/runs/daily/<executed_at>/as_of_YYYY-MM-DD__<run_id>/reports/diagnostics/daily_ops_step_failure_YYYY-MM-DD_<step>_<timestamp>.md` | `aits ops daily-run` | 失败子命令的 stdout/stderr、return code、env secret presence | 命令、退出码、stdout/stderr 行数、脱敏 stdout/stderr、可选 artifact error | 失败排查、root cause 复核 | 是，作为生产运行审计 | 仅失败步骤生成；API key/token/Authorization 和敏感 env 值必须脱敏；不是供应商付费内容归档 |
| `outputs/reports/daily_task_dashboard_YYYY-MM-DD.html/json` | `aits ops daily-run` / `aits reports daily-tasks` | daily_ops_run metadata、本轮同日子报告、evidence dashboard JSON、最近可用 shadow parameter search bundle、最近同日 `shadow_iteration_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `weight_promotion_gate_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `daily_weight_adjustment_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选同日 `research_governance_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选 shadow weight iteration current/candidate JSON、可选 shadow vs production comparison JSON、最近 7/14/30 日已存在的 paper trading summary 和 order intent candidate JSON、可选最近已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json`、search window 内 production decision snapshots | `key_conclusions`、投资动作/仓位/置信度/Data Gate、数据可信度、参数治理、反馈复盘、shadow parameter 诊断领先 trial 与收益差距、Shadow Iteration Status 只读卡片、Paper Trading Summary（candidate_count、blocked_candidates、generated_intents、approved/rejected、submitted、filled/open、reconciliation_status）、Paper Trading Trend（7/14/30 日窗口、latest `replay_mode` / `portfolio_carry_forward`、summary 可用/缺失、候选/订单/成交/PnL/reconciliation、synthetic snapshot 使用比例、top `blocked_by`、top `reason_code`；最近 replay 为 `continuous_portfolio` 时额外展示 final_equity、max_drawdown、exposure_peak、final_positions count 和 expired DAY orders）、Paper Signal Quality 轻量卡片（evaluation_status、主要 `blocked_by`、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、sample_count、report link、observe-only / `production_effect=none`）、Shadow Impact 轻量卡片（impact_status、主要 blocked_by / warnings、7/14/30 日 production/shadow/unknown 样本数、production vs shadow filled_count、paper PnL、continuous replay availability/mode、report link）、Weight Adjustment Candidate 轻量卡片（candidate_count、top_candidate_id、gate_status、main blocked_by、report link、`production_effect=none`）、Weight Candidate Evaluation 轻量卡片（evaluation_status、candidate_count、evaluable_candidate_count、top_candidate_id、main blocked_by、report link、`production_effect=none`）、Weight Promotion Gate 轻量卡片（gate_status、candidate_count、ready_for_manual_review_count、blocked_count、top_candidate_id、main blocked_by、report link、`production_effect=none`）、Daily Weight Adjustment Summary 轻量卡片（candidate_count、evaluation_status、promotion_gate_status、ready_for_manual_review_count、main blocked_by、report link、`production_effect=none`、manual_review_only）、Research Governance Summary 轻量卡片（card_count、missing/limited/warning counts、manual_review_required_count、group_counts、report link、`production_effect=none`）、Shadow Weight Iteration 轻量卡片（current weights、latest decision、latest delta、candidate report link、`production_effect=none`、manual_review_only）、Shadow vs Production Comparison 轻量卡片（status、production decision、shadow decision、score_delta、decision_changed、main reason、report link、`production_effect=none`、manual_review_only）、production/current vs shadow candidate 结果对比表（Total return、Max drawdown、Turnover、Beat rate、样本覆盖和 return 计算口径）、分区参数对比表（Gate cap override 与权重参数，含 production 实际 gate cap 数值/区间）、运行健康、任务状态、子报告 `href` 和可点击子任务下钻入口 | 每日关键结论入口 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 任务状态是审计信息，不是页面首要结论；dashboard 不重新计算 shadow iteration、shadow impact、weight adjustment candidates、weight candidate evaluation、weight promotion gate、daily weight adjustment summary、research governance summary、shadow weight iteration 或 shadow vs production comparison，也不触发 paper trading、paper replay、真实 broker、参数晋级或调参应用，只读取 JSON；dashboard 的 Shadow Impact、Weight Adjustment Candidate、Weight Candidate Evaluation、Weight Promotion Gate、Daily Weight Adjustment Summary、Research Governance Summary、Shadow Weight Iteration 和 Shadow vs Production Comparison 都只展示轻量摘要，不展示 JSON/Markdown 长表；shadow parameter 诊断领先、Shadow Impact、Weight Adjustment Candidate、Weight Candidate Evaluation、Weight Promotion Gate、Daily Weight Adjustment Summary、Research Governance Summary、Shadow Weight Iteration 和 Shadow vs Production Comparison 均不等于可上线；Paper Trading Summary / Trend / Signal Quality / Shadow Impact / Weight Adjustment Candidate / Weight Candidate Evaluation / Weight Promotion Gate / Daily Weight Adjustment Summary / Research Governance Summary / Shadow Weight Iteration / Shadow vs Production Comparison 只展示模拟执行复盘和只读质量解释，缺历史 summary、candidate JSON、continuous replay、signal quality JSON、shadow impact JSON、weight adjustment candidate JSON、weight candidate evaluation JSON、weight promotion gate JSON、daily weight adjustment summary JSON、research governance summary JSON、shadow weight iteration JSON 或 shadow vs production comparison JSON 显示 `LIMITED` / `MISSING` / `INSUFFICIENT_DATA` 或 `continuous_replay_missing` warning 且不补造结论，`LIMITED` / `ERROR` 不阻断主报告；daily-independent 趋势或 replay 不是连续组合收益，continuous replay 摘要也不是实盘收益或上线依据，paper PnL、shadow current weights 和 comparison score_delta 不改变 production 仓位建议；各子任务 Markdown/HTML/JSON 仍是审计源，后续可升级为专属网页 |
| `outputs/reports/daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | `aits ops daily-run` / `aits reports daily-tasks` | daily task dashboard view model、evidence dashboard JSON、parameter governance JSON、feedback / health 子报告、run metadata、source artifact checksums | `as_of`、`run_id`、`production_effect=none`、data_gate status/blocking_reasons、investment_conclusion action_bias/confidence/position_band/major_risks、parameter_governance production_profile/shadow_candidate/promotion_status/blocking_reasons、feedback_review summary、system_health status/warnings、source_artifacts / href / checksum | 后续 OrderIntentBuilder 或 order intent candidate adapter 的只读上游输入；当前只供审计和接线准备 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 不是交易信号、不是订单意图，也不会调用 trading engine；缺子报告时只能标记 `missing` / `limited`，不能把任务成功状态补写成投资结论 |
| `outputs/reports/score_change_attribution_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits reports score-change-attribution` | 当前 `decision_snapshot_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、上一条 signal-time decision snapshot；可显式传入 previous snapshot 或从 snapshot 目录自动发现 | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=score_change_attribution`、`production_effect=none`、comparison window、overall score delta、component score/effective weight/coverage/confidence/contribution delta、gate cap/binding delta、position delta、data quality 状态变化、top positive/negative/weight/coverage/gate changes、methodology | Reader Brief top changes、人工复核“为什么今天变了”、后续 report index | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只比较已存在 snapshot，不重算 score、不读取未来 outcome、不证明因果；缺少上一快照、上一快照不是 prior 或字段不足时输出 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`，不得用当前状态补造变化原因 |
| `outputs/reports/market_panel_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits reports market-panel` | `data/raw/prices_daily.csv`、`data/raw/rates_daily.csv`、同日 data quality gate | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=market_panel`、`status`、`production_effect=none`、benchmark_proxy / ai_sector_proxy / risk_proxy / liquidity_proxy rows、last_price、return_1d/5d/20d、trend_label、risk_interpretation、data_status、source_artifact、data_quality status、methodology | Reader Brief Market Situation、Executive Summary 市场变化一句话、后续 report index | 否，`production_effect=none` | 先运行 data quality gate；门禁通过后只读展示缓存市场代理，不下载数据、不补造市场涨跌、不生成交易指令；缺价格/利率数据或门禁失败时输出 `MISSING_MARKET_PRICE_DATA` 且不读取未验证涨跌，DGS10 的 `return_*` 字段为百分点变化而不是价格收益率 |
| `outputs/reports/research_governance_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits reports research-governance-summary --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--latest` | latest backtest / robustness / gate attribution、parameter governance、SEC PIT backfill / evaluation / baseline comparison / diagnostics / candidate review / baseline coverage / shadow observe / shadow monitor、shadow impact、weight adjustment candidates / candidate evaluation / promotion gate / daily summary artifacts、report index、documentation contract、artifact catalog、report registry | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=research_governance_summary`、`governance_status`、`research_readiness`、`promotion_status`、`manual_review_required`、`production_effect=none`、Executive Governance Status、Backtest Status、Weight Iteration Status、Shadow Observe Status、SEC PIT Research Status、Documentation / Registry Status、manual_review_queue、limitations、source_artifacts，并保留 cards/groups 向后兼容字段 | Reader Brief governance 摘要、Reader Brief Manual Review Queue、daily task dashboard Research Governance Summary 卡片、后续 report index | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只读汇总已有 artifacts，不运行 backtest、SEC PIT、shadow、weight governance、docs、scoring 或 promotion 上游任务；默认 `promotion_status=NOT_PROMOTABLE`，缺 `weight_promotion_gate` 时阻断 promotion；SEC PIT observe-only / `B_RECONSTRUCTED_SEC_FILING_PIT` 明确不是 production；缺失 artifact 只能显示 `MISSING` / `LIMITED`，不得补造 research 结论 |
| `outputs/reports/canonical_system_status_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json`<br/>`outputs/reports/canonical_system_doctor_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits system status --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits system doctor --as-of YYYY-MM-DD`；report 查询可用 `aits reports latest --report-id REPORT_ID --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` | `config/report_registry.yaml`、`config/report_index_visibility_waivers.yaml`、同日 report index 解析结果、engineering surface inventory、Reader Brief consistency validation、latest research-cycle snapshot / research gate、data quality / refresh / fallback / cache catalog report records、`outputs/validation_runtime/*/test_runtime_summary.json`、`outputs/daily/**/manifest.json`、docs/config inventory | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=canonical_system_status` / `canonical_system_doctor`、first screen（current system state、active research candidate、latest research gate、data health、validation health、blockers、warnings、safety boundary、recommended next action、source artifacts）、canonical workflow map、artifact lifecycle summary（CURRENT / SUPERSEDED / ARCHIVED / INVALID / LEGACY）、schema/config summary、reproducibility summary、test suite summary、doctor checks、Reader Brief summary、`production_effect=none` | owner/operator/researcher first status entrypoint、report index、Reader Brief navigation、TRADING-487_to_504 A2/A3 closeout evidence | 否，`production_effect=none` | Status/doctor 只读读取已有 report index 和 artifacts，不运行上游、不刷新数据、不补造 missing artifact、不修改策略/候选/owner decision/paper-shadow/official target weights/production state、不触发 broker/order；doctor 对未豁免 report-index warning、expired waiver、缺 canonical workflow 或 unsafe production effect fail closed；Reader Brief / validation PASS 不得被解释为 research promotion 或 paper-shadow approval。 |

| `data/etf_portfolio/target_weights.csv` | `aits etf portfolio allocate --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits etf run daily --date latest` / ETF backtest 内部同源 allocation logic | ETF data quality gate、features、signals、regime、`config/etf_portfolio/assets.yaml`、`strategy.yaml`、`risk.yaml`、可选 previous weights | date、symbol、target_weight、previous_weight、trade_delta、composite_score、regime、reason_codes、`constraints_applied`、`constraint_diagnostics`、model_version、config_hash、data_quality_status | ETF daily brief、simulation ledger record、P1 attribution、P2 observe-only risk reports、人工 ETF allocation 复核 | 否，decision-support target only | `constraint_diagnostics` 是 JSON list，记录 asset/sleeve/equity/cash/rebalance/turnover 约束的 before/after、reason 和 severity；drawdown/volatility penalty 已在 signal score 层体现，不是 allocation 输出里的后验收益解释；target weights 不是实盘订单，也不触发 broker |
| `data/simulation/etf_ledger.csv` | `aits etf simulation record --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits etf simulation evaluate --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` | ETF target weights、ETF price cache、ETF data quality gate、model version/config hash | `record_type=decision/evaluation`、decision_date、model_version、config_hash、feature_snapshot_hash、signal_snapshot_hash、asset_scores、target_weights、previous_target_weights、weight_deltas、observe_only、production_effect、evaluation_as_of_date、future/forward_return_1d/5d/20d/60d、max_drawdown_next_20d/60d、relative_return_vs_spy_20d、relative_return_vs_qqq_20d、weight_contribution_20d、portfolio_return_20d、portfolio_relative_return_vs_spy_20d、portfolio_relative_return_vs_qqq_20d | `aits etf simulation report`、ETF daily brief Simulation Performance、manual model-version review | 否，simulation evidence only | decision rows 固定 `evaluation_only=false` 且不承载 future outcome；evaluation rows 固定 `evaluation_only=true` 并按 `evaluation_as_of_date` deterministic upsert；forward window 不足或 benchmark 缺失时相关 outcome 字段必须保持 null，不得填 0；ledger 是后验观察记录，不是自动调仓、promotion 或实盘交易授权 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/data_quality_*.md` | `aits etf data validate` / ETF data-dependent commands | `data/raw/prices_daily.csv` 或显式 ETF price path、ETF asset/strategy config、CASH synthetic series | data quality status、schema/duplicate/price/volume/freshness issues、covered symbols、quality report date、ETF-specific validation scope | ETF features、signals、allocation、backtest、daily brief 的前置质量证据；`config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_data_quality` 条目 | 否，质量报告本身不生成交易动作 | PASS 只表示 ETF 缓存数据可用于后续 ETF pipeline，不等于投资结论可靠；FAIL 时 ETF data-dependent workflow 必须停止 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/backtests/*/daily.csv/weights.csv/trades.csv/summary.md/summary.json/metrics.json/stability_diagnostics.json/stability_diagnostics.md` | `aits etf backtest run`；stability artifacts 也可由 `aits etf backtest diagnostics --latest` / `--run-id ...` 从既有 run 重新生成 | ETF signals、regimes、target weight rules、ETF price cache、backtest config、transaction cost policy、`primary_benchmark_id`、B000-B008 benchmark registry、daily/weights history | Market Regime、Requested Date Range、Effective Signal Range、Data Quality status、Model Version、Config Hash、daily strategy return、asset_returns_json、asset_contributions_json、weight history、trade delta/turnover/cost、Total Return、CAGR、Max Drawdown、Sharpe、Sortino、Calmar、Turnover、`standardized_metrics`、`monthly_returns`、`metric_null_reasons`、extended metrics、`allocation_stability_diagnostics`、`benchmark_metrics`、`benchmark_comparisons` common schema、correctness notes | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_backtest_summary` 条目、Reader Brief report navigation 和 ETF Backtest Summary 摘要、P2 walk-forward readiness、experiment registry metrics lookup、未来 weight governance、人工 strategy/config/stability 复核、Weight Research Program v1 B0 control result | 否，backtest evidence only | 历史回测不是未来收益承诺；`standardized_metrics` 是跨策略/参数比较 schema，`monthly_returns` 用 primary benchmark 口径输出 strategy / benchmark / excess return 和月内回撤；无法计算的 Sharpe、Sortino、Calmar、monthly 或 benchmark 字段必须为 null 并在 `metric_null_reasons` 说明，不能补 0；stability diagnostics 用配置化 `max_daily_turnover` / `max_rebalance_trade_weight` 作为 policy reference，首日全现金建仓与后续 rebalance policy check 分开披露；B000 是 research-only `static_default_portfolio` 控制组，权重来自 `assets.yaml` 的 `default_weight`，不改变 `primary_benchmark_id`；B001-B008 包括 buy-and-hold SPY/QQQ/SMH/SOXX、static_growth_balanced、static_ai_growth、ma_50_200_qqq 和 risk_off_cash_switch；2022-12-01 前数据只作为 warm-up 或对照，不能替代 `ai_after_chatgpt` 结论窗口；`weights.csv` 和 `trades.csv` 是审计历史，不是实盘订单 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/experiments/<run_id>/run_manifest.json/experiment_results.json/benchmark_results.json/metrics_summary.json/diagnostics_summary.json/comparison_report.json/comparison_report.md/candidate_selection_report.json/candidate_selection_report.md` | `aits etf experiments run --pack etf_calibration_v1 --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD` 或 `--experiment <experiment_id>`；comparison 由 `aits etf experiments compare --run-id <run_id>` / `--latest` 生成；candidate selection 由 `aits etf experiments select-candidates --run-id <run_id>` / `--latest` 生成 | `config/etf_portfolio/experiments.yaml`、`config/etf_portfolio/experiment_packs.yaml`、ETF baseline config、ETF price cache、ETF data quality gate、ETF backtest engine、`risk_adjusted_v1` ranking policy、`shadow_only_manual_review` promotion policy | run manifest、experiment ids、requested date range、git commit、config/data hash、metric schema version、per-experiment PASS/FAILED、benchmark metrics、strategy/standardized metrics、allocation stability diagnostics、failed experiment ids、安全字段、comparison metrics table、risk/turnover/stability table、candidate score、component scores、hard rejection flags、ranking reasons、candidate selection status、rejected/blocked counts、manual review requirement、`production_promotion_allowed=false` | 后续 TRADING-064 shadow enrollment、weekly review、report index / Reader Brief 和人工校准复核 | 否，`observe_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none` | Batch experiment result 是受控校准证据，不是 production recommendation；ranking policy 不按 total return 单一排序，high-return candidate 仍可能因 turnover、drawdown、missing benchmark 或 unsafe safety flags 被 hard reject；candidate selection 只允许 shadow/manual-review 状态，不能输出 production approval；单个 experiment failure 必须在 diagnostics 中可见，unsafe experiment/pack 应在运行前 fail closed；runtime 输出在 `reports/` 下，不提交源码 |
| `data/simulation/etf_shadow_candidates.json` 和 `reports/etf_portfolio/experiments/weekly_reviews/weekly_review_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits etf experiments enroll-shadow --run-id <run_id> --candidate <candidate_id>` / `--latest --top N`；weekly review 由 `aits etf experiments weekly-review --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `--latest` 生成 | `candidate_selection_report.json`、source experiment run metrics、`weekly_shadow_review_v1` review policy、ETF price cache 和 source comparison metrics | shadow candidate count、candidate/source run/model/config hash、start date、status、daily/weekly evaluation schedule、weekly candidate/baseline/QQQ forward return、drawdown、turnover、weight stability、constraint hits、recommended action、manual review notes、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_shadow_candidates` / `etf_experiment_weekly_review` 条目、Reader Brief `ETF Calibration Experiments` 摘要、人工 shadow observation review | 否，`observe_only=true`、`production_effect=none`、`broker_action=none` | Shadow registry 是 ignored runtime state，不是正式组合权重；weekly review 只建议 `continue_shadow`、`needs_more_data`、`reject_candidate` 或 `promote_to_longer_observation`，且 `production_promotion_allowed=false`；active shadow candidate 不等于 production candidate |

review/pack`、`validate-promotion-pack` | `config/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/parameter_sweep_v1.yaml`、`config/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/parameter_sweep_real_smoke.yaml`、TRADING-091 real evaluation policy、TRADING-092 review context、cached data quality gate、configured data manifest hash、tiny fixture proxy outputs or per-candidate real evaluation artifacts、latest pointer files | sweep manifest、normalized config、data manifest、candidate/result/error JSONL、checkpoint、gate summary、leaderboard JSON/Markdown、candidate report、walk-forward windows/results/leaderboard/report、sensitivity matrix、stress/regime bucket results、overfit diagnostics、shadow registry/report、scheduled observe due/skip/block audit、promotion manifest/decision/metric deltas/risk summary/linked artifacts/Reader Brief section、latest pointers、安全字段、`evaluator_mode`、`evaluator_version`、`real_evaluation_artifact_path`、`data_quality`、`metrics_source`、`not_for_investment_decision`、`production_candidate_generated=false` | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_parameter_sweep_leaderboard`、`etf_dynamic_v3_walk_forward_report`、`etf_dynamic_v3_robustness_report`、`etf_dynamic_v3_shadow_report`、`etf_dynamic_v3_promotion_pack`、Reader Brief Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep 摘要、daily-run scheduler observe artifact、owner manual promotion review | 否，research / observe-only / manual review evidence | Parameter sweep 先 hard gate 再 soft ranking，score 不能覆盖 hard gate；`shadow register` 只消费已存在的 candidate report，不自动生成 source artifact；rejected candidate fail closed，walk-forward / robustness observation basis 按 candidate 匹配，缺失时记录 `incomplete_observation_basis`；`artifacts repair-latest` 只从 canonical dynamic-v3 report root 重建 latest pointers，不运行 research 或 promotion，`artifacts validate` 会拒绝测试临时目录或 canonical 根外 pointer；`schedule observe` 只做 due/skip/block、latest pointer validation、stale 检查和可选 observe-only shadow monitor，不自动运行 `run-profile`、real sweep 或 promotion pack；tiny fixture mode 只验证 artifact contract，必须标记 `not_for_investment_decision=true` 且 promotion pack 不得 `promote_candidate`；real mode metrics 必须来自 linked real evaluation artifact，`validate-sweep` 会检查 artifact path 存在，但 real leaderboard 仍最多进入 `promote_candidate + manual_review_required`，不得自动生成 `production_candidate`、owner approval、shadow enrollment、baseline mutation、official target weights 或 broker action |

| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/medium_real/<report_id>/medium_real_report.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/medium_real/<report_id>/medium_real_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue medium-real report --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`validate-medium-real --sweep-id <sweep_id>` | `medium_real` sweep manifest、leaderboard、candidate results/errors、real evaluation artifacts and artifact size inventory | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_medium_real_report`、medium_real_report_id、source_sweep_id、profile/evaluator_mode、completed/failed/rejected/observe/promote counts、average runtime、artifact size summary、reject distribution、recommended_next_action、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_medium_real_report`、overnight readiness、research decision、manual search-space review | 否，medium_real run summary only | 300 candidate floor 未满足时必须有可审计 shortfall reason；medium_real report 不是 promotion decision，不能把 top score 直接解释为 production candidate |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/regime_coverage/<coverage_id>/regime_coverage_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/regime_coverage/<coverage_id>/regime_gap_report.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/regime_coverage/<coverage_id>/regime_coverage_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue regime-coverage run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-regime-coverage --coverage-id <coverage_id>` | cached ETF prices, source sweep requested range, candidate results and linked real evaluation artifacts | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_regime_coverage_manifest`、coverage_id、market_regime、requested_range、coverage_status、tech_semiconductor_relevance、ai_bull_market_overfit_risk、regime_gap_report、candidate_regime_matrix、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_regime_coverage`、candidate interpretation pack、research decision | 否，regime coverage audit only | 缺 drawdown、semiconductor stress、sideways/high-vol/recovery 覆盖时必须降低或阻断研究结论；单一 AI bull window 的高分不能被解释为跨 regime robustness |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/interpretation/<candidate_id>/<interpretation_id>/interpretation_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/interpretation/<candidate_id>/<interpretation_id>/candidate_interpretation_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue candidate interpretation-pack --sweep-id <sweep_id> --candidate-id <candidate_id>`、`candidate interpretation-report --candidate-id <candidate_id>`、`validate-interpretation-pack --candidate-id <candidate_id>` | candidate result/report, evidence summary, regime coverage, weight path metadata, candidate attribution, overfit diagnostics | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_interpretation_pack_manifest`、candidate_id、rank、gate_status、parameters、evidence_status、turnover_source、drawdown_protection_behavior、tech_semiconductor_regime_behavior、major_weight_changes、recommendation、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_interpretation_pack`、manual owner review、research decision source links | 否，human interpretation pack only | Interpretation pack 是人工阅读包，不是 candidate approval；weight path 缺失必须显示 incomplete，manual_review_required 不得被报告文案淡化 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/observe_pool/<pool_id>/observe_pool_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/observe_pool/<pool_id>/observe_candidates.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/observe_pool/<pool_id>/observe_pool_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue observe-pool build --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-observe-pool --pool-id <pool_id>` | medium_real sweep, evidence summary, regime coverage, parameter governance shadow policy | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_observe_pool_manifest`、pool_id、source_sweep_id、observe_candidate_count、manual_review_required_count、rejected_candidates、shadow_registry_sync_status、observe_candidates path、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_observe_pool`、Reader Brief observe pool fields、research decision、manual shadow register workflow | 否，observe-only candidate pool only | Build 默认 `shadow_registry_sync_status=NOT_SYNCED_BY_DEFAULT`；observe pool 不写 shadow registry、不 enroll candidate，后续 shadow register 必须显式 owner review/command |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/overnight_readiness/<readiness_id>/overnight_readiness_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/overnight_readiness/<readiness_id>/overnight_readiness_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue overnight-readiness run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-overnight-readiness --readiness-id <readiness_id>` | medium_real sweep manifest/results/errors/checkpoint, artifact size inventory, evidence completeness and overfit summary | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_overnight_readiness_manifest`、readiness_id、overnight_readiness、blocking_reasons、warnings、projected_overnight_runtime_hours、projected_artifact_size_gb、failure_rate、evidence_completeness_rate、top_candidate_stability、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_overnight_readiness`、Reader Brief overnight readiness fields、research decision | 否，readiness gate only | Readiness report 不启动 `overnight_real`；READY/READY_WITH_WARNINGS 仍需要 owner 确认 runtime、disk budget 和 review need，不代表自动运行许可 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/research_decision_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/next_action_recommendations.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/research_decision_report.md`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision/<decision_id>/reader_brief_section.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue research-decision run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-research-decision --decision-id <decision_id>` | evidence summary, regime coverage, interpretation pack, observe pool and overnight readiness latest artifacts for the same sweep | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision_manifest`、decision_id、source_sweep_id、medium_real_success、research_value_candidate_found、evidence_quality_status、regime_coverage_status、observe_candidate_count、overnight_readiness、recommendation、priority、source_artifacts、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision`、Reader Brief research decision fields、owner next Codex task selection | 否，research decision summary only | Research decision 给出下一步工程/研究建议，不是 investment action；推荐 `run_overnight_real` 也必须经 owner 显式确认，不得自动触发更大 sweep |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/diagnosis_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/candidate_blocking_matrix.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/blocking_reason_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/gate_category_summary.json` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue evidence-diagnosis run --sweep-id <sweep_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-evidence-diagnosis --diagnosis-id <diagnosis_id>` | medium_real source sweep, evidence summary, candidate evidence matrix, linked data/window/weight/attribution/provenance/overfit evidence | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_diagnosis_manifest`、diagnosis_id、source_sweep_id、candidate_count、usable_candidates、hard_blocked_candidates、soft_blocked_candidates、warning_candidates、blocking reason/category distributions、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_diagnosis`、gate impact matrix、gate policy review、Reader Brief Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep fields | 否，evidence blocker diagnosis only | Diagnosis 只解释为什么 candidates 被 gate 阻断；hard/soft 分类不解除 promotion blocker，不修改 source sweep，不生成 observe pool、shadow registry、production candidate 或 broker action |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_impact/<impact_id>/gate_impact_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_impact/<impact_id>/gate_impact_matrix.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_impact/<impact_id>/candidate_recovery_simulation.json` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue gate-impact run --diagnosis-id <diagnosis_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-gate-impact --impact-id <impact_id>` | evidence diagnosis manifest and candidate blocking matrix | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_gate_impact_manifest`、impact_id、source_diagnosis_id、scenario_count、baseline_usable_candidates、baseline_observe_candidates、best_scenario、best_observe_candidates、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_gate_impact`、evidence gate policy selection、Reader Brief best-scenario fields | 否，scenario simulation only | Simulation 不修复 data 或 evidence artifacts；best scenario 只说明如果 owner 接受某类 policy，可能恢复多少 observe-only candidates，不代表 promotion eligibility 或 overnight approval |
| `config/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_gate_policy_v1.yaml`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_policy/<policy_run_id>/gate_policy_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_policy/<policy_run_id>/policy_effect_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/gate_policy/<policy_run_id>/calibrated_candidate_status.jsonl` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue gate-policy validate`、`gate-policy report`、`gate-policy apply --sweep-id <sweep_id>` | reviewed evidence gate policy config, source sweep, evidence summary and candidate blocker classifications | policy owner/version/status/rationale/intended effect/review condition、`report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_gate_policy_manifest`、policy_run_id、policy_version、observe_only_candidates、manual_review_required_candidates、hard/manual-review reason distributions、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_gate_policy`、candidate recovery input、Reader Brief policy version/count fields | 否，policy-calibrated observe-only gate only | Policy may downgrade documented soft blockers to observe-only/manual-review, but true hard failures still fail closed；policy apply does not rewrite source candidates, approve promotion, write shadow registry, or create production candidates |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/recovery_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/recovered_candidates.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/recovery_leaderboard.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/candidate_recovery/<recovery_id>/rejected_after_calibration.jsonl` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue candidate-recovery run --sweep-id <sweep_id> --policy-run-id <policy_run_id>`、`report --latest`、`validate-candidate-recovery --recovery-id <recovery_id>` | source sweep, calibrated candidate status from gate policy, evidence summary | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_candidate_recovery_manifest`、recovery_id、source_policy_run_id、candidate_count、recovered_candidate_count、observe_only_candidate_count、manual_review_required_count、rejected_after_calibration_count、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_candidate_recovery`、observe-pool rebuild input、research decision update、Reader Brief recovered count fields | 否，observe-only recovery artifact only | Recovered candidates are still manual-review-only and observe-only；recovery does not register shadow candidates, approve overnight_real, mutate baseline/production, or authorize broker action |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/decision_update_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/go_no_go_matrix.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/next_action_recommendations.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/research_decision_update/<decision_update_id>/reader_brief_section.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue research-decision update --sweep-id <sweep_id> --diagnosis-id <diagnosis_id> --impact-id <impact_id> --recovery-id <recovery_id>`、`update-report --latest`、`validate-research-decision-update --decision-update-id <decision_update_id>` | evidence diagnosis, gate impact, candidate recovery, rebuilt observe pool and overnight readiness artifacts for the same sweep | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision_update_manifest`、decision_update_id、go_no_go、recommended_action、recovered_candidate_count、observe_candidate_count、go_no_go_matrix、warnings、required_owner_approval、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_research_decision_update`、Reader Brief final Dynamic Rescue Parameter Sweep go/no-go fields、owner next-task selection | 否，go/no-go research update only | `GO_WITH_LIMITS` means limited owner-reviewed research may continue with manual review; it is not investment guidance, production promotion, shadow enrollment, official target weight mutation, baseline mutation, broker action, or automatic `overnight_real` trigger |

candidate |

target weights、paper/real portfolio、baseline/production state、policy 或 broker |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/shortlist/<shortlist_id>/shortlist_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/shortlist/<shortlist_id>/shortlist_candidates.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/shortlist/<shortlist_id>/shortlist_score_breakdown.json` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue shortlist build --observe-pool-id <pool_id>`、`shortlist report --latest`、`validate-shortlist --shortlist-id <shortlist_id>` | rebuilt observe pool candidates, linked real evaluation metrics, evidence statuses, regime coverage and weight path metadata | `report_type=etf_dynamic_v3_shadow_shortlist_manifest`、shortlist_id、source_observe_pool_id、shortlist_count、target/min/max sizes、hard rejected count、selection reasons、score breakdown、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_shortlist`、candidate clustering、Reader Brief shortlist fields、owner shortlist review | 否，manual shortlist evidence only | Shortlist score cannot override hard failures；selected candidates remain observe-only/manual-review and do not become production candidates or approved shadow enrollments |

`PIT_UNSAFE` is excluded by default and cannot be reintroduced by `--include-pit-warning`; `ADVISORY_GENERATED_AFTER_AS_OF_DATE`, `MISSING_PRICE_DATA`, and missing target weights are hard PIT limitations; future prices are not decision inputs, backfilled returns cannot approve production, and calibration recommendations do not mutate config, target weights, real portfolio, broker state, or promotion status |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/replay_diagnosis/<diagnosis_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/backfill_repair/<repair_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/variant_comparison/<comparison_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/rule_calibration/<calibration_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/replay_forward_bridge/<bridge_id>/...` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue replay-diagnosis/backfill-repair/variant-comparison/rule-calibration/replay-forward-bridge report --latest`；生成入口为对应 `run` 命令和 `validate-replay-diagnosis`、`validate-backfill-repair`、`validate-variant-comparison`、`validate-rule-calibration`、`validate-replay-forward-bridge` | TRADING-141 到 TRADING-145 的 inventory/replay/backfill/sim/review artifacts、current cached price/rate data quality gate、optional repaired backfill windows | manifest `schema_version` / `status`、coverage breakdown、pending reason summary、artifact health matrix、repair actions、repaired outcome windows、availability delta、variant window metrics、pairwise comparison、rank summary、rule diagnostics、manual-only proposed policy adjustments、calibration safety checks、forward tracking focus、weekly review updates、Reader Brief section、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_replay_diagnosis`、`etf_dynamic_v3_backfill_repair`、`etf_dynamic_v3_variant_comparison`、`etf_dynamic_v3_rule_calibration`、`etf_dynamic_v3_replay_forward_bridge`；Reader Brief replay-forward bridge fields | 否，diagnosis/calibration/forward tracking evidence only | Backfill repair does not rewrite the source backfill and does not use future prices as replay decision input; variant ranking is a diagnostic comparison, not a policy score; rule calibration proposals require owner approval and keep `auto_apply=false`; replay-forward bridge is a watchlist, not production approval, broker authorization, baseline mutation, official target weight mutation, or portfolio mutation |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/outcome_due/<due_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/replay_sample_expansion/<expansion_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/outcome_dashboard/<dashboard_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/limited_vs_notrade/<focus_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/consensus_risk/<risk_id>/...` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue outcome-due/replay-sample-expansion/outcome-dashboard/limited-vs-notrade/consensus-risk report --latest`；生成入口为对应 `scan` / `run` / `build` 命令和 `validate-outcome-due`、`validate-replay-sample-expansion`、`validate-outcome-dashboard`、`validate-limited-vs-notrade`、`validate-consensus-risk` | TRADING-141 到 TRADING-150 replay/forward artifacts、forward advisory outcomes、backfilled outcomes、historical paper simulation outputs、replay diagnosis pending reasons、current cached price/rate data quality gate | manifest `schema_version` / `status`、due window inventory、pending window summary、update-ready list、candidate source inventory、expanded replay events、PIT classification summary、outcome availability matrix、outcome mode summary、pending reason dashboard、limited-vs-no-trade sample inventory/window metrics/regime breakdown、consensus exposure/drawdown/turnover risk、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_outcome_due`、`etf_dynamic_v3_replay_sample_expansion`、`etf_dynamic_v3_outcome_dashboard`、`etf_dynamic_v3_limited_vs_notrade`、`etf_dynamic_v3_consensus_risk`；Reader Brief outcome dashboard fields | 否，forward outcome accumulation / replay sample / risk-review evidence only | Outcome due scan must pass cached data quality before price-dependent due classification; sample expansion excludes PIT_UNSAFE rows; outcome dashboard only aggregates availability and does not rerun upstream; limited-vs-notrade never applies policy; consensus risk does not generate default consensus execution, broker authorization, baseline mutation, official target weight mutation, or portfolio mutation |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/outcome_update_review/<update_review_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/outcome_update/<outcome_update_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/rolling_evidence_refresh/<refresh_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/evidence_trend/<trend_id>/...`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/forward_outcome_decision/<decision_id>/...` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue outcome-update-review/outcome-update/rolling-evidence-refresh/evidence-trend/forward-outcome-decision report --latest`；生成入口为对应 `run` 命令和 `validate-outcome-update-review`、`validate-outcome-update`、`validate-rolling-evidence-refresh`、`validate-evidence-trend`、`validate-forward-outcome-decision` | TRADING-151 到 TRADING-155 outcome due / dashboard / focused evaluation / consensus risk artifacts、forward advisory outcomes、paper tracking owner attribution、shadow aging、weekly advisory review | update-ready review matrix、impact preview、safety checks、updated/skipped windows、outcome status delta、refreshed artifact ids、evidence delta summary、trend timeseries、confidence trend summary、forward go/no-go matrix、next actions、Reader Brief sections、安全字段 | `config/report_registry.yaml` 的 `etf_dynamic_v3_outcome_update_review`、`etf_dynamic_v3_outcome_update`、`etf_dynamic_v3_rolling_evidence_refresh`、`etf_dynamic_v3_evidence_trend`、`etf_dynamic_v3_forward_outcome_decision`；Reader Brief forward outcome decision fields | 否，safe outcome update / rolling evidence / decision-support evidence only | Safe runner only preserves READY_TO_UPDATE window mutations and restores non-ready windows; rolling refresh updates evidence artifacts only; evidence trend marks single-refresh history as INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY; forward decision must keep `rule_calibration_readiness=NOT_READY` when evidence is weak and cannot trigger broker, production, owner auto approval, official target weight mutation, real portfolio mutation, baseline mutation, or policy auto apply |
