| `outputs/reports/candidate_rejection_postmortem_template_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`<br/>`outputs/reports/candidate_rejection_postmortem_template_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits reports candidate-rejection-postmortem-template --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits reports validate-candidate-rejection-postmortem-template --latest`；可选 `--postmortem-json-path <filled.json>` | 同日 `outputs/reports/report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；latest paper-shadow promotion board、owner decision audit log、monthly review pack、research safety boundary audit；可选已填写 rejection postmortem JSON | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=candidate_rejection_postmortem_template` / `candidate_rejection_postmortem_template_validation`、`template_status=TEMPLATE_READY|TEMPLATE_BLOCKED`、8 个 required sections、blank template、optional filled postmortem validation、candidate id、failed evidence / stress / data quality / safety counts、revisit assessment、lessons learned、Reader Brief section、safety boundary、`production_effect=none` | report index、Reader Brief Candidate Rejection Postmortem Template 摘要、owner rejection archive、promotion board、extended shadow protocol、governance end-to-end pack | 否，`production_effect=none` | Template 只定义 manual rejection postmortem contract；没有 filled record 时不得补造 rejection；filled record 缺 required section、缺 rejection reason、缺 revisit decision、缺 lessons 或带 state/broker/order mutation flag 时 fail closed；不自动拒绝候选、不修改 candidate/paper-shadow/production state、不生成 official target weights、不触发 broker/order |
| `outputs/reports/decision_snapshot_lifecycle_policy_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`<br/>`outputs/reports/decision_snapshot_lifecycle_policy_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits reports decision-snapshot-lifecycle-policy --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits reports validate-decision-snapshot-lifecycle-policy --latest`；可选 `--allow-latest-context` | canonical `data/processed/decision_snapshots/decision_snapshot_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；同日 `outputs/reports/report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json`（可缺失但需披露）；latest available decision snapshot | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=decision_snapshot_lifecycle_policy` / `decision_snapshot_lifecycle_policy_validation`、`snapshot_lifecycle_status=SNAPSHOT_AVAILABLE|SNAPSHOT_NOT_DUE|SNAPSHOT_MISSING_BLOCKING|SNAPSHOT_MISSING_NON_BLOCKING`、target as-of、context mode、canonical snapshot path、latest available snapshot、market session、blocking impact、source report dependencies、Reader Brief section、validation checks、safety boundary、`production_effect=none` | report index、Reader Brief Decision Snapshot Lifecycle Policy 摘要、research governance recovery pack | 否，`production_effect=none` | Policy 只读检查既有 decision snapshot；不运行 `score-daily`、不刷新数据、不创建/复制/回填缺失 snapshot、不把 latest snapshot 冒充当日 snapshot。交易日到期且缺 canonical snapshot 时输出 `SNAPSHOT_MISSING_BLOCKING`；显式 latest-context 只允许输出受限阅读上下文，不形成同日结论；未来日期或 NYSE 休市日缺失为 not due；不批准 paper-shadow、extended shadow、official target、broker/order、live trading 或 production mutation |
| `outputs/reports/extended_shadow_observation_clock_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`<br/>`outputs/reports/extended_shadow_observation_clock_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits reports extended-shadow-observation-clock --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits reports validate-extended-shadow-observation-clock --latest` | 同日 `outputs/reports/report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；paper-shadow weekly review；paper-shadow promotion board | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=extended_shadow_observation_clock` / `extended_shadow_observation_clock_validation`、`observation_clock_status=OBSERVATION_PERIOD_UNMET|OBSERVATION_PERIOD_PARTIAL|OBSERVATION_PERIOD_MET`、observation start date、complete observation trading days、missing day count/list、invalid day count/list/reasons、current/required count、source evidence、Reader Brief section、validation checks、safety boundary、`production_effect=none` | report index、Reader Brief Extended Shadow Observation Clock 摘要、extended shadow protocol | 否，`production_effect=none` | Clock 只读聚合既有 observation evidence；缺 source 或缺可审计 observation days fail closed 到 `OBSERVATION_PERIOD_UNMET`，不得补造 observation dates、不得运行 paper-shadow observation、不批准 extended shadow/live/official allocation、不修改 candidate/paper-shadow/production state、不生成 official target weights、不触发 broker/order |
| `outputs/reports/extended_shadow_protocol_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`<br/>`outputs/reports/extended_shadow_protocol_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits reports extended-shadow-protocol --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits reports validate-extended-shadow-protocol --latest` | 同日 `outputs/reports/report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；paper-shadow promotion board、evidence staleness monitor、paper-shadow weekly review、shadow continuation readiness、research safety boundary audit、cost sensitivity review、benchmark baseline control、owner decision audit log、artifact lineage graph、extended-shadow observation clock | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=extended_shadow_protocol` / `extended_shadow_protocol_validation`、`eligibility_status=EXTENDED_SHADOW_BLOCKED|EXTENDED_SHADOW_NOT_READY|EXTENDED_SHADOW_REVIEW_REQUIRED|EXTENDED_SHADOW_ELIGIBLE`、minimum observation policy、observed/minimum trading days、eligibility checklist、blocking/warning reasons、Reader Brief section、validation checks、safety boundary、`production_effect=none` | report index、Reader Brief Extended Shadow Protocol 摘要、owner extended shadow review、promotion board、governance end-to-end pack | 否，`production_effect=none` | Extended shadow 仍是 paper-shadow-only；严格要求 no blocking stale data、no unresolved safety warnings、stable weekly coverage、acceptable cost sensitivity、benchmark comparison、owner decision、lineage 和 observation clock minimum period。Hard blocker 输出 `EXTENDED_SHADOW_BLOCKED`，observation-only gap 输出 `EXTENDED_SHADOW_NOT_READY`，warning-only evidence 输出 `EXTENDED_SHADOW_REVIEW_REQUIRED`，全部 gate pass 才能输出 `EXTENDED_SHADOW_ELIGIBLE`；不运行上游、不刷新数据、不补造 observation/owner/metrics、不修改 candidate/paper-shadow/production state、不生成 official target weights、不触发 broker/order |
| `outputs/reports/research_roadmap_dashboard_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`<br/>`outputs/reports/research_roadmap_dashboard_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits reports research-roadmap-dashboard --as-of YYYY-MM-DD` / `aits reports validate-research-roadmap-dashboard --latest` | 同日 `outputs/reports/report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；`docs/task_register.md`、`docs/task_register_completed.md`；latest monthly review pack、promotion board、extended shadow protocol、candidate rejection postmortem template、research safety boundary audit、artifact lineage graph、task register consistency | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=research_roadmap_dashboard` / `research_roadmap_dashboard_validation`、`dashboard_status=ROADMAP_HEALTHY|ROADMAP_WARNINGS|ROADMAP_BLOCKED`（validator 兼容 legacy `ROADMAP_WITH_WARNINGS`）、active/completed task summary、open blockers、stale/missing artifacts、active candidates、latest paper-shadow/data-governance/safety/lineage statuses、next recommended tasks、Reader Brief section、safety boundary、`production_effect=none` | report index、Reader Brief Research Roadmap Dashboard 摘要、manual roadmap review、governance end-to-end pack | 否，`production_effect=none` | Dashboard 只读聚合 task registers、report index 和既有 governance artifacts；next recommended tasks 只是 owner/developer review 队列，不自动调度、不修改 task/candidate/paper-shadow 状态、不运行上游、不刷新数据、不补造 artifact、不写 official target weights、不触发 broker/order；缺 source、stale artifact、blocked monthly review、promotion board hold、extended shadow blocked/not ready、safety/lineage blocker 必须可见披露 |

| `outputs/reports/order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | `aits ops daily-run` / `aits reports daily-tasks` / `scripts/run_paper_trading_from_candidates.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` 默认补齐缺失上游 | `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、decision snapshot、position/gate 结论 | `as_of`、`run_id`、`production_effect=none`、`execution_boundary`、`source_inputs`、OrderIntentCandidate schema-compatible `candidates`、`blocked_by`、source decision、score snapshot、position/gate context | 后续 order intent candidate adapter 的只读候选输入；当前只表达“如果未来允许交易，系统可能想做什么” | 否，`production_effect=none` | daily-run / default runner 生成的 candidate 必须 `blocked=true`，且至少包含 `trading_engine_not_enabled` 和 `manual_approval_required`；Data Gate 不通过或缺失时使用 `data_gate_blocked`；不是 `OrderIntent`，不调用真实 broker API、真实下单接口或账户状态；只有显式审查后 `blocked=false` 且 `mode=paper` 的 candidate 才能由 runner 转为 paper `OrderIntent` |
| `outputs/runs/daily/<executed_at>/as_of_YYYY-MM-DD__<run_id>/manifest.json` | `aits ops daily-run` | 本轮 daily-run artifacts | run id、checksum、legacy mirror、visibility cutoff；artifact 记录由 `ArtifactRef` 统一生成 | 复现、归档、审计 | 是，作为运行 bundle | `data/raw` / `data/processed` 仍是状态缓存，不会每轮完整复制；manifest 只记录产物引用和 checksum，不保存 stdout/stderr 原文 |
| `outputs/replays/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>/replay_run.md/json` | `aits ops replay-day` | cache-only input freeze | visible cutoff、input blockers、excluded future PIT/valuation/manual/OpenAI inputs、replay artifacts；OpenAI cache-only report 缺失时 queue 先过滤并写入 `source_report_status=MISSING`，再 fail closed | 历史复现、diff、窗口 failure summary source | 否，不改 production artifacts | replay 不是 live daily-run，也不应调用 live provider；report 缺失不能让未来 OpenAI queue 原样进入 replay |
| `outputs/replays/windows/<run_id>/replay_window.md/json` | `aits ops replay-window` | 单日 replay bundle、交易日历 | day_runs status、bundle/report paths、diff status、skipped_dates、失败日 `failure_summary.errors`、`failed_step` 和 blocker artifacts | 窗口级复现验收、归档输入缺口审计 | 否，不改 production artifacts | 窗口整体 FAIL 可能来自少数归档输入缺口；必须看 `failure_summary` 判断是数据缺档、步骤失败还是周末跳过 |
| `outputs/replays/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>/input/config/expected_price_tickers.csv` | `replay-day --full-universe` | `config/universe.yaml`、replay 过滤后的 `prices_daily.csv` | ticker、included/excluded status、required_scope、visible_in_replay_price_cache、reason；同一记录登记到 `input_freeze_manifest.csv/json` | replay-scoped `score-daily --expected-price-tickers-path` 数据质量门禁 | 否，不改 production artifacts | 只冻结本次 replay expected ticker 集合；baseline/core/benchmark 缺价格仍 fail closed，full-universe 扩展 ticker 缺 replay 可见价格只进入 exclusion audit；不得补造价格或放宽 production `--full-universe` 校验 |
| `outputs/replays/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>/diff_vs_production.md` | `replay-day --compare-to-production` | replay bundle、production artifacts | checksum、row count、status diff | PIT 复核 | 否 | diff 说明产物不同，不自动说明哪个结论正确 |

## Trading engine / paper trading 产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `data/trading_engine/audit/{order_intent_log,risk_check_log,order_log,execution_report_log,fill_log,portfolio_snapshot}/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl` | `ExecutionService` / `JsonlAuditLogger` | paper-only `OrderIntent`、risk result、paper order、execution report、portfolio snapshot | 每行包含 timestamp、run_id、strategy_id、schema_version、source_object_id、payload、`intent_id` 或 `related_intent_ids`；`replay_intent_audit_trace` 可按 intent 回放完整轨迹 | paper trading 审计和测试复现 | 否，paper trading MVP；真实交易仍未启用 | `execution_report_log` 和 `fill_log` 不等价；rejected intent 不应有 broker order 或 fill；portfolio snapshot 可通过 `related_intent_ids` 关联到 intent |
| `reports/trading_daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `scripts/run_paper_trading_demo.py` / `scripts/run_paper_trading_from_candidates.py` / trading report writer | paper trading audit state、orders、fills、portfolio snapshot、ReconciliationResult | OrderIntent 数量、风控通过/拒绝、paper order、成交/未成交/取消、portfolio、realized/unrealized PnL、reconciliation status、`production_effect=none` | paper trading 执行复盘 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 不是实盘交易日报，不代表真实账户、券商状态或真实成交；reconciliation `PASS` 只说明 paper portfolio 与本地 audit/fill 重建一致 |
| `outputs/reports/paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | `scripts/run_paper_trading_from_candidates.py` / trading report writer | `order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、paper trading report、audit log、ReconciliationResult、可选 historical OHLC | status、candidate_count、blocked_candidates、generated_intents、approved/rejected、submitted、filled/open/cancelled、realized/unrealized PnL、reconciliation_status、market_snapshot_source / counts、audit_log_path、trading daily report path、`production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Paper Trading Summary 区块和 paper replay 汇总 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 该 JSON 只把模拟执行复盘带回每日主入口；market snapshot 优先 historical OHLC，其次 candidate metadata，最后才 synthetic limit price；`LIMITED` / `ERROR` 不阻断主报告，不代表实盘订单、账户状态或 broker 回报，也不会改变 production 仓位建议 |
| `outputs/reports/paper_trading_replay_START_END.json/md` | `scripts/run_paper_trading_replay.py --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD --mode daily-independent` 或 `--mode continuous-portfolio` | 每日 `order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`；缺失时由 candidate runner 生成 limited `daily_decision_summary` 和 `order_intent_candidates`；逐日 paper summary / trading daily report / audit log；可选 historical OHLC | `replay_mode`、`portfolio_carry_forward`、`production_effect=none`、`order_expiration_policy`、`unsupported_order_policy`、`continuous_metrics_available`、quality_flags、market_snapshot_source 分布、窗口状态、paper-only execution boundary、candidate / blocked / intent / risk / order / fill / PnL totals、reconciliation_status 分布、按 symbol / strategy_id / reason_code / blocked_by 聚合、每日结果和 limited upstream 标记；continuous 额外输出 `expired_day_orders`、`rejected_gtc_orders`、`carried_positions_count`、`final_cash`、`final_equity`、`final_positions`、`max_position_concentration`、`max_drawdown_pct`、equity curve、exposure peak 和 final portfolio summary | paper trading daily flow validation、复盘、dashboard latest replay 摘要和 paper signal quality 可选输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | `daily-independent` 每天重新初始化组合，不是连续组合收益；`continuous-portfolio` 是 paper-only 连续组合模拟，不是真实账户收益、真实 broker 成交、完整税费/滑点模拟或实盘上线依据；DAY order 当日未成交即过期；GTC / non-DAY candidate 直接 rejected；replay 不读取 broker API key、不调用真实 broker；缺候选只生成 limited artifacts，不补造投资结论 |
| `outputs/reports/paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_paper_signal_quality.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 最近 7/14/30 日 `paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`config/paper_signal_quality_policy.yaml`、可选既有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json` | 顶层 `policy_id`、`policy_version`、thresholds snapshot、`evaluation_status`、`evaluation_gate` checks / `blocked_by` / human-readable explanation / reason explanations、`PAPER_ONLY_SIMULATION` warning、daily-independent / no carry-forward 时的 `DAILY_INDEPENDENT_ONLY` warning、sample_count、candidate_count、generated_intents、filled_count、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、historical_ohlc_coverage、reconciliation_pass_ratio、按 strategy_id / symbol / reason_code / blocked_by / confidence bucket / market_snapshot_source 聚合的 sample_count、candidate_count、generated_intents、filled_count、avg_paper_pnl、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、quality_status、observe-only 安全边界、`production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Paper Signal Quality 轻量卡片、paper signal 质量复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 使用 `continuous-portfolio` replay 时不再输出 `DAILY_INDEPENDENT_ONLY`，但仍必须输出 `PAPER_ONLY_SIMULATION`；`evaluation_status` / `quality_status` 只允许 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`、`OBSERVE_ONLY`、`PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED`、`LOW_DATA_QUALITY`、`UNRELIABLE`，禁止 live/trade/promotion/approval 语义；evaluation gate 只解释 paper signal quality，不影响 production 仓位建议、参数晋级、真实交易或 replay；脚本不读取 broker API key、不调用真实 broker、不触发 paper runner/replay；paper PnL 只作诊断字段，不是上线依据 |
| `outputs/reports/shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_shadow_parameter_impact.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 最近 7/14/30 日 `order_intent_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_trading_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`config/shadow_parameter_impact_policy.yaml`、可选既有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json` | `impact_status`（仅 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA` / `OBSERVE_ONLY` / `SHADOW_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED` / `NO_CLEAR_IMPROVEMENT` / `SHADOW_UNRELIABLE` / `LOW_DATA_QUALITY`）、`policy_id`、`policy_version`、`thresholds_snapshot`、`impact_gate` checks / blocked_by / warnings / explanation / reason explanations、production / shadow / unknown source_profile 分类、candidate_count、generated_intents、approved/rejected、submitted/filled/open/cancelled、realized/unrealized paper PnL、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、historical_ohlc_coverage、reconciliation_pass_ratio、blocked_by / reason_code / confidence bucket performance、continuous replay availability、source artifact path / mode / date range、profile final_equity / max_drawdown（仅 continuous portfolio 可用时）、observe-only 安全边界、`production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Shadow Impact 轻量卡片、shadow 参数 paper/replay/signal quality 复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | `SHADOW_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED` 仍不是上线、实盘、交易或参数批准；短期 paper PnL 为正不能单独证明 shadow 更好；缺 shadow 样本、production baseline 或 continuous replay 时输出 `continuous_replay_missing` warning；daily-independent replay 不会被当作 continuous portfolio 结果；synthetic snapshot 或 OHLC 覆盖问题会输出 `LOW_DATA_QUALITY` 或 gate blocked；脚本不读取 broker API key、不调用真实 broker、不触发 paper runner/replay、不改变 production 参数、仓位建议、参数晋级或交易执行 |
| `outputs/reports/weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_weight_adjustment_candidates.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json`、`config/weight_adjustment_candidate_policy.yaml`、`config/parameter_governance.yaml`、`config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml`、可选 `config/weights/shadow_weight_profiles.yaml` | 顶层 `mode=observe_only`、`production_effect=none`、`policy_id`、`policy_version`、thresholds snapshot、candidate gate、source artifacts、`candidate_count`、`top_candidate_id`；每个 candidate 包含 `candidate_id`、`generated_at`、`source_profile`、`target_profile`、`parameter_changes`、`reason_codes`、`expected_effect`、`risk_notes`、`blocked_by`、`required_validations` 和 `production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Weight Adjustment Candidate 轻量卡片、人工调权候选复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只允许向 existing shadow profile 小步靠近，单日最大变化受 policy 限制且总权重不失衡；candidate gate 必须阻断 insufficient sample、low data quality、synthetic snapshot ratio too high、continuous replay missing、shadow impact insufficient、paper signal quality unreliable 和 manual approval required；缺关键输入时输出 `LIMITED` / blocked candidate；脚本不修改 `weight_profile_current.yaml`、不写 approved overlay、不改变 dashboard 主结论、不触发 paper runner/replay/broker/交易，也不根据单日 paper PnL 调高权重 |
| `outputs/reports/weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_weight_candidate_evaluation.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json` 或 continuous replay summary、`config/weight_candidate_evaluation_policy.yaml`、`config/parameter_governance.yaml`、`config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml`、可选 `config/weights/shadow_weight_profiles.yaml` 和可选 `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json` | 顶层 `evaluation_mode=observe_only`、`production_effect=none`、`evaluation_status`、policy id/version/thresholds snapshot、安全边界、source artifact checksums、7/14/30 日窗口（candidate_count、evaluable_candidate_count、blocked_candidate_count、insufficient_data_count、low_quality_data_count、continuous replay availability、synthetic_snapshot_ratio、historical_ohlc_coverage、reconciliation_pass_ratio、paper_signal_quality_status、shadow_impact_status、replay_mode、可用的 max_drawdown_delta / final_equity_delta / exposure_delta / concentration_delta）；每个 candidate 包含 `candidate_id`、source/target profile、parameter_changes、required_validations、evaluation_status、blocked_by、warnings、scorecard、recommendation 和 `production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Weight Candidate Evaluation 轻量卡片、manual review 前的候选权重复核 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只读取已有产物，不主动重跑历史任务；candidate 级 `evaluation_status` 只允许 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`、`OBSERVE_ONLY`、`CANDIDATE_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED`、`NO_CLEAR_IMPROVEMENT`、`CANDIDATE_UNRELIABLE`、`LOW_DATA_QUALITY`；candidate 本身 blocked、manual approval、样本不足、低数据质量、synthetic snapshot ratio 过高、continuous replay 缺失、shadow impact insufficient、paper signal quality unreliable、reconciliation unreliable、drawdown/exposure/concentration worse 都必须 blocked；即使 candidate 看起来更好，也只能进入 manual review；脚本不修改 production profile、不触发 IBKR / PaperBroker / replay runner / 交易，不影响 dashboard 主结论 |
| `outputs/reports/weight_promotion_gate_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_weight_promotion_gate.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`paper_signal_quality_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`shadow_parameter_impact_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选已有 `paper_trading_replay_START_END.json`、可选 `daily_decision_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、可选 `config/parameter_governance.yaml` 和可选 `config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml` | 顶层 `gate_mode=manual_review_only`、`production_effect=none`、`promotion_gate_status`、policy id/version/thresholds snapshot、安全边界、source artifact checksums、candidate_count、ready_for_manual_review_count、blocked_count、top_candidate_id、main blocked_by；每个 candidate 包含 `candidate_id`、`candidate_evaluation_status`、`promotion_gate_status`、`blocked_by`、`warnings`、`improvement_summary`、`risk_delta_summary`、`data_quality_summary`、`required_manual_review_items`、`recommendation` 和 `production_effect=none` | daily task dashboard 的 Weight Promotion Gate 轻量卡片、manual review 前最后一层候选权重 gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只读取已有产物，不主动重跑 candidate evaluation、paper runner、replay runner 或 broker；promotion gate status 只允许 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`、`OBSERVE_ONLY`、`BLOCKED`、`NO_CLEAR_IMPROVEMENT`、`CANDIDATE_PROMISING_BUT_LIMITED`、`READY_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW`；缺 candidate evaluation、candidate hard blocked、manual_approval_required 缺失、样本/filled 不足、数据质量差、synthetic snapshot ratio 高、OHLC coverage 低、reconciliation 低、continuous replay 缺失、drawdown/exposure/concentration 恶化、shadow/paper unreliable、data gate BLOCK 或重大 risk warning 都必须 blocked；`READY_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW` 也不是自动晋级、不修改 production profile、不影响交易、不代表 live readiness |
| `outputs/reports/daily_weight_adjustment_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_daily_weight_adjustment.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md`、`weight_promotion_gate_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | 顶层 `mode=observe_only`、`production_effect=none`、`candidate_status`、`evaluation_status`、`promotion_gate_status`、candidate/evaluable/ready/blocked counts、`top_candidate_id`、`main_blocked_by`、warnings、source artifacts、missing artifacts、required manual review items、recommendation、安全边界和 `manual_review_only=true` | daily task dashboard 的 Daily Weight Adjustment Summary 轻量卡片、每日只读权重调节人工复核入口 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 第一版只读取已有 015/016/017 产物，不主动重跑 candidate generator、candidate evaluation、promotion gate、paper runner、replay runner、controlled fill、lifecycle、comparison 或 broker；缺任一 JSON/Markdown 时只标记 `LIMITED` / `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`，不补造 improvement，且 summary 不把 promotion gate 展示为 `READY_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW`；即使上游 gate 可进入人工复核，也只输出 `manual_review_only`，不修改 production profile、不写 approved profile、不改变 dashboard 主投资结论、不触发交易；当前只预留未来 GitHub Actions / Windows Task Scheduler / cron 接入，不自动启用定时任务 |
| `outputs/reports/daily_weight_adjustment_scheduler_dry_run_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/run_daily_weight_adjustment_scheduler_dry_run.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 015/016/017 artifact，以及封装调用的 `daily_weight_adjustment_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | 顶层 `mode=dry_run`、`production_effect=none`、`manual_review_only=true`、`started_at`、`completed_at`、`duration_seconds`、`dry_run_status`、`invoked_command`、`generated_artifacts`、`missing_artifacts`、`pipeline_status`、candidate/ready/blocked counts、`promotion_gate_status`、warnings 和 safety checks | Windows Task Scheduler dry-run 审计、每日定时调用安全性验证 | 否，`production_effect=none` | dry-run 只验证 scheduler 能安全调用 summary pipeline；允许刷新 daily summary 和写自身报告，不修改 production profile、不写 approved profile、不触发 IBKR、PaperBroker、replay、controlled fill、lifecycle、comparison 或 Git 自动 commit/push；缺上游 artifact 时 `dry_run_status=LIMITED`，不补造 improvement；GitHub Actions schedule 当前不建议启用，优先本地 Windows Task Scheduler 连续观察 3～7 天 |
| `data/derived/weight_iterations/shadow/current_shadow_weights.json` + `data/derived/weight_iterations/shadow/candidates/shadow_weight_candidate_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` + `history/` + `logs/` | `python scripts/run_daily_shadow_weight_iteration.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | 同日 `weight_adjustment_candidates_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`weight_candidate_evaluation_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`weight_promotion_gate_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、`daily_weight_adjustment_summary_YYYY-MM-DD.json`、TRADING-018A scheduler dry-run safety JSON、`config/daily_shadow_weight_iteration_policy.yaml`、首次初始化时只读 `config/weights/weight_profile_current.yaml` snapshot | candidate 顶层 `mode=shadow_only`、`production_effect=none`、`manual_review_only=true`、`decision`、input artifacts、safety checks、policy id/version/file_exists/thresholds/confidence defaults、confidence、previous/proposed/new shadow weights、constraints/evidence/audit；current 记录 schema、shadow-only weights、constraints、source、audit update_count；history 记录成功 UPDATE 后快照；logs 记录 run-level 写入结果 | daily task dashboard 的 Shadow Weight Iteration 只读卡片；后续 TRADING-018C production vs shadow comparison 输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | `current_shadow_weights.json` 只代表 shadow 系统内部迭代结果，production 不得直接读取；policy 缺失、TRADING-018A `report_type` 不匹配或缺输入输出 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA`，safety 非 PASS 输出 `SAFETY_BLOCKED`，信号不足输出 `NO_UPDATE`，均不得更新 current；只有 `UPDATE` 才写 history 并原子替换 current；脚本不写 production profile、不写 approved profile、不触发 broker/replay/交易、不实现 promotion |

| `docs/runbooks/daily_operator_brief_scheduler_manual_installation.md` + `docs/requirements/daily_operator_brief_scheduler_manual_installation_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | TRADING-027 documentation-only change | TRADING-021/022/023/024/026 的既有 runbook、artifact contract 和 owner 安全边界要求；不读取 runtime data | Manual scheduler installation guide、pre-installation checklist、safety checklist、Windows Task Scheduler / cron / GitHub Actions documentation-only examples、dry-run decision handling、manual validation、failure handling、disable / pause steps；固定声明 `production_effect=none`、`manual_review_only=true`、`runbook_only=true`、`scheduler_created=false`、`operator_brief_executed_by_runbook=false`、`pipelines_executed_by_runbook=false`、`data_downloaded_by_runbook=false`、`apply_executed_by_runbook=false`、`rollback_executed_by_runbook=false`、`broker_execution=false`、`replay_execution=false`、`trading_execution=false` | 人工安装 Daily Operator Brief scheduler 前的审查入口；无 dashboard runtime artifact | 否，`production_effect=none` | TRADING-027 produces documentation artifacts only. No runtime data artifact is produced. It does not create Windows Task Scheduler tasks, cron jobs, GitHub Actions workflows, scheduler scripts, market/backtest/scoring/data download pipeline outputs, apply/rollback results, broker actions, replay runs, or trading execution. |

| `data/derived/operator_briefs/scheduler_template_validation/daily_operator_brief_scheduler_template_validation_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` + `data/derived/operator_briefs/scheduler_template_validation/logs/daily_operator_brief_scheduler_template_validation_run_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `python scripts/validate_daily_operator_brief_scheduler_templates.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` | TRADING-028 template metadata JSON 和其中声明的 Windows XML、PowerShell、batch、cron、GitHub Actions `.template` 文件；不读取 runtime market/backtest/scoring/data artifacts | 顶层 `task_id=TRADING-029`、`mode=daily_operator_brief_scheduler_template_validation_only`、`validation_status`（`PASS` / `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` / `FAIL` / `SAFETY_BLOCKED` / `INPUT_MISSING` / `INPUT_INVALID` / `ERROR`）、`template_results`、`coverage`、`safety_validation`、`alerts`、`manual_review_required` 和 audit；固定 `production_effect=none`、`manual_review_only=true`、`scheduler_template_validation_only=true`、`read_only=true`、`scheduler_created=false`、`scheduler_installed=false`、`scheduler_enabled=false`、`templates_executed_by_validator=false`、`operator_brief_executed_by_validator=false`、`pipelines_executed_by_validator=false`、`data_downloaded_by_validator=false`、`apply_executed_by_validator=false`、`rollback_executed_by_validator=false`、`broker_execution=false`、`replay_execution=false`、`trading_execution=false`、`safe_for_scheduler=true` | daily task dashboard 的 Scheduler Template Validation Report 只读卡片；TRADING-027 人工安装前的独立模板静态验证输入 | 否，`production_effect=none` | 这是 static validator，不是 scheduler installer、不是 template runner、不是 operator brief runner；`safe_for_scheduler=true` 只表示 validator 本身可运行，不表示模板已安装或启用；validator 不写 `.github/workflows/*.yml`、不写 crontab、不调用 `schtasks`、不运行 TRADING-021/022/023/024/026/028 或任何 market/backtest/scoring/data download/broker/replay/trading pipeline；dashboard 只读 latest TRADING-029 validation artifact，不运行 validator |

## Backtest / feedback 产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_YYYY-MM-DD_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits backtest` | validated data、PIT inputs、scoring rules | regime、date range、returns、drawdown、benchmark comparison、limitations | 投研复核、parameter replay | 否，回测不自动改规则 | 默认结论窗口应声明 `ai_after_chatgpt` |
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_daily_YYYY-MM-DD_YYYY-MM-DD.csv` | `aits backtest` | daily scoring context | signal date、score、target exposure、next return、costs、gates | robustness、gate attribution、parameter replay | 否 | 不是 production ledger |
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_robustness_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits backtest --robustness-report` | 已完成的 backtest daily rows、robustness / validation policy、benchmark and cost assumptions | `schema_version`、robustness scenario status、coverage/source veto、OOS / random / signal-family baseline evidence、drawdown / turnover / bootstrap evidence、`production_effect=none` | parameter replay、research governance summary、manual promotion review | 否，`production_effect=none` | robustness 证据不是 production approval；scenario leading 或 robustness PASS 仍需 owner review、forward shadow 和 promotion contract，不自动改 scoring rules、weights 或 position gates |
| `outputs/backtests/backtest_input_coverage_*.csv` | `aits backtest` | PIT slices、quality reports | source coverage、missing inputs、warning status | audit、candidate veto | 否 | 高收益但覆盖不足不应直接晋级 |
| `outputs/reports/parameter_replay_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits feedback build-parameter-replay` | robustness summary | scenario deltas、materiality、limitations | parameter candidate ledger | 否 | as-if replay 不是 approved overlay |
| `data/processed/parameter_candidates.json` | `aits feedback build-parameter-candidates` | parameter replay | candidate id、trial metrics、veto reasons、governance status | parameter governance、shadow runner | 否 | candidate ready 不等于 owner approval |
| `outputs/reports/parameter_governance_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` | `aits feedback evaluate-parameter-governance` | `config/parameter_governance.yaml`、`data/processed/parameter_candidates.json`、owner quantitative input status | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=parameter_governance`、parameter surface status、candidate status、blocked reasons、owner input state、config checksum、recommended action、`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief、report index、research governance summary、daily task dashboard 和 manual parameter review | 否，`production_effect=none` | parameter governance 只给出参数面行动建议和阻断原因；缺 owner 输入时不能系统代填生产参数，validation-only shadow 也不等于 owner approval 或 production-ready |
| `outputs/reports/market_feedback_optimization_YYYY-MM-DD.md` | `aits feedback optimize-market-feedback` | outcomes、causal chains、candidates、overlays | readiness、sample floors、open gaps、next actions | 复盘、治理 | 否 | readiness 不是生产配置变更 |
| `data/processed/prediction_outcomes.csv` | `aits feedback calibrate-predictions` | prediction ledger、prices | horizon、available/pending/missing、benchmark excess | shadow maturity、promotion review | 否 | outcome 是后验观察，不能改写原 prediction |

## Shadow / validation-only 参数搜索产物

| Artifact | 由谁生成 | 上游输入 | 关键字段或内容 | 下游使用 | 是否影响 production | 常见误解 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `config/weights/shadow_weight_profiles.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | production weight profile | validation-only profile、weights、metadata | shadow observation | 否，`production_effect=none` | 不替换 `weight_profile_current.yaml` |
| `config/weight_adjustment_candidate_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | paper signal quality、shadow impact、continuous replay 和 production/shadow profile 复核要求 | max single-day weight delta、total weight tolerance、sample floors、synthetic snapshot cap、required validations 和 safety boundaries | `run_weight_adjustment_candidates.py` 的 candidate gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只约束 observe-only 候选生成，不批准修改 production profile |
| `config/weight_candidate_evaluation_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | weight adjustment candidates、paper signal quality、shadow impact、continuous replay 和 profile metadata 复核要求 | sample floors、synthetic snapshot cap、OHLC coverage、reconciliation PASS floor、max drawdown / exposure / concentration delta gate、required validations 和 safety boundaries | `run_weight_candidate_evaluation.py` 的 evaluation gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只约束 observe-only 候选评估，不批准 production promotion 或交易 |
| `config/weight_promotion_gate_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | weight candidate evaluation、paper signal quality、shadow impact、continuous replay、daily data gate 和 profile metadata 复核要求 | sample floors、filled floor、synthetic snapshot cap、OHLC coverage、reconciliation PASS floor、risk delta gate、stable improvement window floor、required validations 和 manual-review-only safety boundaries | `run_weight_promotion_gate.py` 的 promotion gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只决定 candidate 是否可进入人工复核，不批准生产修改、交易或 live readiness |
| `config/daily_shadow_weight_iteration_policy.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | TRADING-015/016/017/018/018A artifacts 和 current shadow state | max abs/relative daily delta、minimum adjustment confidence、confidence defaults、conservative default weights、normalization target、min/max weight、required inputs 和 safety boundaries | `run_daily_shadow_weight_iteration.py` 的 shadow-only update gate | 否，`production_effect=none` | policy 只约束 shadow current state 的小步迭代，不批准 production promotion、production profile 修改或交易；policy 缺失时不得更新 shadow current |
| `config/weights/shadow_position_gate_profiles.yaml` | 人工维护 / 系统建议 | scoring/portfolio gate policy | validation-only gate cap overrides | shadow observation | 否 | relaxed gate 不是 production gate 放宽 |
| `config/weights/shadow_parameter_search_space.yaml` | 人工维护 | production weights/gates | weight grid、gate cap grid、bounds | parameter search | 否 | 搜索空间内最优不是无限连续空间最优 |
| `config/weights/shadow_parameter_objective.yaml` | 人工维护 | validation policy | objective、sample floor、regularization、eligibility | parameter search ranking | 否 | objective 排名不是 promotion contract |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/manifest.json` | `aits feedback search-shadow-parameters` | snapshots、prices、search configs | input checksum、resolver version、git status、run params | reproducibility、promotion contract | 否 | manifest 不批准上线 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/trials.csv` | `search-shadow-parameters` | weight/gate candidates | trial id、metrics、objective、eligibility、regularization | analysis、Pareto front | 否 | trial 多不代表统计独立样本多 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/pareto_front.csv` | `search-shadow-parameters` | trials | non-dominated trials | review | 否 | Pareto front 不等于可上线名单 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/best_profiles.yaml` | `search-shadow-parameters` | eligible/diagnostic trials | candidate profile snapshot | review / forward shadow prep | 否 | 不应复制覆盖生产配置 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/search_report.md` | `search-shadow-parameters` | manifest、trials、attribution | eligible status、diagnostic-leading trial、factorial attribution、cap-level attribution、position changes | 人读参数搜索报告 | 否，`production_effect=none` | diagnostic-leading 只是当前样本解释，不是 production 建议 |
| `outputs/parameter_search/<run_id>/shadow_parameter_promotion_<run_id>.md/json` | `aits feedback evaluate-shadow-parameter-promotion` | search bundle、promotion contract | NOT_PROMOTABLE / READY_FOR_FORWARD_SHADOW / READY_FOR_OWNER_REVIEW、blockers | promotion review | 否，直到 owner approval 仍不改 production | `READY_FOR_FORWARD_SHADOW` 仍不是上线批准 |
| `artifacts/data_freshness/YYYY-MM-DD/market_data_freshness_summary.json/md` + `outputs/reports/market_data_freshness_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits data freshness --latest` / `aits data validate-freshness --latest` / `aits reports data-freshness --latest` | `config/data/market_data_freshness.yaml`、`data/raw/prices_daily.csv`、latest valid `backtest_input_manifest.json`、`price_cache_registry.json`、U.S. market calendar | tracking date、expected/effective data date、latest raw/registry/manifest date、calendar status、asset coverage、freshness status（OK / ACCEPTABLE_LAG / NON_TRADING_DAY / STALE / MISSING / SOURCE_DELAYED / MARKET_CALENDAR_UNKNOWN / FAILED）、tracking readiness、suggested actions、safety fields | Portfolio Candidate Tracking readiness gate、Dashboard、Reader Brief、Shadow Parameter Backtest supporting artifact | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只读 freshness gate，不下载数据、不伪造价格、不刷新 manifest；STALE/MISSING 只能给出 repair/refresh 建议并阻断或降级 tracking，不能解除 promotion |
| `artifacts/data_refresh/YYYY-MM-DD/market_data_refresh_plan.json` + `market_data_refresh_summary.json/md` + `outputs/reports/market_data_refresh_YYYY-MM-DD.json/md` | `aits data refresh-market --latest` / `--dry-run` / `--plan-only` / `--date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--symbols ...`；`aits data validate-refresh --latest`；`aits data recover-freshness --latest`；alias 由 `aits reports data-refresh --latest` 读取 | `config/data/market_data_refresh.yaml`、latest `market_data_freshness_summary.json`、`data/raw/prices_daily.csv`、audited FMP raw cache、FMP/Yahoo provider、`price_cache_registry.json`、`backtest_input_manifest.json`、candidate tracking config | refresh status（NOT_NEEDED / PLANNED / OK / PARTIAL / SOURCE_DELAYED / FAILED / BLOCKED）、before/after freshness、target date、required/refreshed assets、source and symbol mapping、registry/manifest refresh、rerun freshness/tracking、remaining limitations、safety fields | Dashboard `Market Data Refresh` 卡片、Reader Brief refresh 摘要、Portfolio Candidate Tracking `refresh_report`、Shadow Parameter Backtest supporting artifact | 否，`production_effect=none` | 只在 stale/missing freshness recovery 中刷新 required asset price rows；source delayed 时不得生成假价格或 synthetic latest bar；即使 freshness 恢复 OK，也不启用 candidate profile、不解除 promotion 禁止、不修改 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml` |
| `artifacts/shadow_backtest/YYYY-MM-DD/shadow_backtest_summary.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` | `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、`config/parameters/shadow/shadow_backtest.yaml`、`config/parameters/promotion/promotion_rules.yaml`、通过 `aits validate-data` 同路径校验的市场/宏观缓存、同日 backtest input diagnostics、可选 `signal_snapshot.json`、可选同日 `signal_ablation_summary.json`、可选 latest `signal_calibration_summary.json`、可选 latest `portfolio_sensitivity_summary.json` | baseline/candidate 参数版本、walk-forward 窗口、baseline vs candidate metrics、参数变化归因、data quality status、price_data_status、signal_snapshots_status、backtest_mode、score_calculation、score_attribution、parameter_contribution_summary、promotion_constraints、PIT 限制、promotion decision、可选 `supporting_artifacts.signal_ablation` / `supporting_artifacts.signal_calibration` / `supporting_artifacts.portfolio_sensitivity`、`production_effect=none` | Dashboard `Shadow Parameter Backtest` 只读卡片、Reader Brief `Parameter Shadow Review`、manual parameter review | 否，`production_effect=none` | 这是 observe-only 参数回测，不会修改 `config/parameters/production/current.yaml`、production weights、hard gates、broker 或交易动作；`signal_ablation`、`signal_calibration` 和 `portfolio_sensitivity` 只作为 supporting artifacts，不能解除 `full_signal_backtest_limited`、proxy/fallback 或 manual review 限制；best sensitivity profile 不是 production 参数建议；`price_only_shadow_backtest` 只能 rejected，`full_signal_backtest_limited` 最多 watch，只有 full-signal OK 才可进入 candidate 复核；数据不足时必须 `INSUFFICIENT_DATA` / rejected |
| `artifacts/shadow_parameters/YYYY-MM-DD/shadow_parameters.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` | Shadow Parameter Backtest summary | 本轮 bounded grid 选出的 shadow 参数快照、参数变化和人工复核边界 | 人工复核、candidate 参数记录 | 否，`production_effect=none` | shadow 参数不是 production 参数，也不是 approved overlay |
| `artifacts/candidate_parameters/YYYY-MM-DD/candidate_parameters.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` | Shadow Parameter Backtest summary、promotion rules | 达到或部分达到晋升复核条件的候选参数记录、promotion status、manual review checklist | 参数人工复核 | 否，除非未来独立 manual promotion workflow 明确批准 | 生成 candidate artifact 不等于允许写 production |
| `artifacts/parameter_promotion/YYYY-MM-DD/parameter_promotion_decision.json/md` | `aits parameters shadow-backtest --latest` / `aits reports parameter-promotion --latest` | Shadow Parameter Backtest summary、`promotion_rules.yaml` | `schema_version=1`、`report_type=parameter_promotion_decision`、promotion `status`（`rejected` / `watch` / `candidate` / `manual_review_required`）、hard rejections、criteria results、manual review items、`production_effect=none` | Dashboard、Reader Brief、人工 promotion review | 否，`production_effect=none` | promotion decision 只给建议；`candidate` 也仍需人工复核，不会自动晋升 |
| `data/processed/shadow_iteration_registry.csv` + `outputs/reports/shadow_iteration_YYYY-MM-DD.md/json` + `outputs/shadow_iterations/<run_id>/*` | `aits feedback run-shadow-iteration` / `aits feedback register-forward-shadow` | search bundle、promotion contract、既有 registry | `weight_only` / `gate_only` / `weight_gate_bundle` 分类、lifecycle status、Trial Card、blocked reasons、retirement evidence、P2 guardrails、attribution、position change 降级状态、lineage | dashboard 只读展示、forward shadow 候选管理 | 否，`production_effect=none` | iteration registry 只管理 shadow 观察状态；`register-forward-shadow` 只改 registry 状态；`gate_only` 和 bundle 不得被当作权重晋级候选 |
| `data/processed/prediction_ledger_flow_validation.csv` | `aits feedback run-parameter-shadow` | parameter candidates、production snapshot | validation-only challenger predictions | flow validation outcomes | 否 | 不应和正式 `prediction_ledger.csv` 混同 |

## production_effect 标签

| 标签 | 含义 | 典型位置 |
|---|---|---|
| `production` | 正式生产判断链路的一部分，会进入 canonical scoring / snapshot / ledger 语义 | production decision snapshot、production prediction ledger 行 |
| `advisory` | 投研辅助或趋势判断输出，不自动交易 | daily score report、execution advisory |
| `none` | 只读、诊断、shadow 或 validation-only，不改变生产评分、仓位 gate、正式 ledger 或 approved overlay | dashboard、shadow search、flow validation ledger |
| `validation-only` | 用于验证参数、规则或流程，不可当成生产候选批准 | parameter search、shadow gate / weight profiles |
| `blocked` | 被质量、治理、样本、owner approval 或 promotion contract 阻断 | promotion report、candidate governance |

运行时核心标签由 `ai_trading_system.core.production_effect.ProductionEffect` 表达。历史报告中较长的解释性 production effect 文本需要逐处确认语义后再迁移，不能自动归并。

当一个产物声明 `production_effect=none` 时，它仍然可以非常有价值，但价值是诊断、学习、复核或准备 forward shadow，而不是直接改变 production 结论。

| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_limited/<smoothed_id>/smoothed_limited_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_limited/<smoothed_id>/smoothed_target_weights.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_limited/<smoothed_id>/smoothing_events.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_limited/<smoothed_id>/lag_events.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_limited/<smoothed_id>/weight_jump_reduction_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_limited/<smoothed_id>/smoothed_limited_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue smoothed-limited generate/report` 和 `validate-smoothed-limited` | latest or requested `model_target` artifact、`limited_adjustment` method weights、smoothed config | `schema_version=1`、`status`、`target_method=smooth_weights_3d_limited_adjustment|smooth_weights_5d_limited_adjustment`、base_method、effective smoothing policy、smoothing events、lag events、weight jump reduction summary、安全字段 | `etf_dynamic_v3_smoothed_limited` registry entry、Reader Brief smoothed fields、backfill / owner review | 否，research target only | `smoothed_target_weights.jsonl` 不是 official target weights；只能作为 owner research review、paper-shadow backfill 和 forward confirmation 输入。 |
| `reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_backfill/<smoothed_backfill_id>/smoothed_backfill_manifest.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_backfill/<smoothed_backfill_id>/smoothed_method_states.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_backfill/<smoothed_backfill_id>/smoothed_trade_ledger.jsonl`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_backfill/<smoothed_backfill_id>/smoothed_backfill_summary.json`<br/>`reports/etf_portfolio/dynamic_v3_rescue/smoothed_backfill/<smoothed_backfill_id>/smoothed_backfill_report.md` | `aits etf dynamic-v3-rescue smoothed-backfill run/report` 和 `validate-smoothed-backfill` | `paper_shadow_backfill_v1.yaml`、smoothed config、cached price/rate data quality gate、current target method definitions | `schema_version=1`、`status`、`market_regime=ai_after_chatgpt`、date_start/date_end、data_quality、smoothing_event_count、lag_event_count、turnover、weight_jump_reduction、trade ledger、安全字段、`not_pit_safe=true` from source backfill | `etf_dynamic_v3_smoothed_backfill` registry entry、comparison/review pack、Reader Brief smoothed fields | 否，non-PIT historical paper shadow research evidence | Backfill 必须先运行 cached data quality gate；它使用 current method definition 回填，不是 PIT replay，不能作为 production approval。 |

| `outputs/reports/reader_brief_YYYY-MM-DD.html/json` Dynamic Rescue Smoothed Research Method Review excerpt | `aits reports reader-brief --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--latest` | `report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json` 中最新的 `etf_dynamic_v3_smoothed_limited`、`etf_dynamic_v3_smoothed_backfill`、`etf_dynamic_v3_smoothed_comparison` 和 `etf_dynamic_v3_smoothed_review` artifacts，并读取 sibling summary / metrics / lag / decision files | `etf_dynamic_v3_system_target.smoothed_id`、`smoothed_backfill_id`、`smoothed_comparison_id`、`smoothed_review_id`、`smoothed_decision`、`smoothed_recommended_method`、`smoothed_secondary_method`、`smoothed_confidence`、`smoothed_improvements_vs_limited`、`smoothed_return_delta_vs_limited`、`smoothed_drawdown_delta_vs_limited`、`smoothed_turnover_delta_vs_limited`、`smoothed_rolling_consistency_delta`、`smoothed_stability_conclusion`、`smoothed_lag_cost_status`、`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief smoothed review 摘要及 artifact 下钻入口 | 否，`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief 只读 report index 和 sibling artifacts，不运行 smoothed generation/backfill/comparison/review CLIs；缺 artifact 时显示 `MISSING`，不能补造 approval、official target weights、order ticket 或 broker action。 |

| 产物 / 文件 | 生成命令 | 输入 | 关键字段 | 消费方 | 改变生产？ | 注意事项 |

| `outputs/reports/reader_brief_YYYY-MM-DD.html/json` Dynamic Rescue Weight Experiment excerpt | `aits reports reader-brief --date YYYY-MM-DD` / `--latest` | `report_index_YYYY-MM-DD.json` 中最新的 `etf_dynamic_v3_experiment_triage`、`etf_dynamic_v3_top_variant_interpretation` 和 `etf_dynamic_v3_method_promotion_plan` artifacts，并读取 sibling scorecard / summary / method specs files | `etf_dynamic_v3_system_target.experiment_triage_id`、`experiment_top_variant`、`experiment_promote_count`、`experiment_keep_testing_count`、`experiment_reject_count`、`top_variant_interpretation_id`、`best_experiment_variant`、`top_variant_solved_failure_modes`、`method_promotion_plan_id`、`proposed_method_names`、`promotion_implementation_scope`、`promotion_next_action`、`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief weight experiment 摘要及 artifact 下钻入口 | 否，`production_effect=none` | Reader Brief 只读 report index 和 sibling artifacts，不运行 experiment factory CLI；缺 artifact 时显示 `MISSING`，不能补造 promotion candidate、formal implementation approval、official target weights、order ticket 或 broker action。 |

latest
